items.situation: undergraduate research symposium abstract submission deadline
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. This is a reminder from the Office of Undergraduate Studies that abstracts for the Fall Scholars Symposium are due next Wednesday by noon. We've extended this round to projects from every college, so engineering, education, and the performing arts are all encouraged to take part. Here's something new this year: each abstract must list a faculty sponsor who has agreed to review your poster beforehand. You don't need finished results to apply, but you do need a clear research question. Upload everything through the symposium tab on the student portal, and we'll confirm your slot by email within two business days.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To remind students of an approaching abstract deadline and new rules
options.B: To recruit faculty members to serve as symposium poster judges
options.C: To explain how symposium prize winners will be selected this fall
options.D: To discourage performing arts students from applying this year

questions.explanation: 通告核心是提醒学者研讨会摘要的截止日期，并说明今年的新要求，A 正确。B 把对象弄反：是学生找教师做赞助人，不是招募教师当评委；C 通告完全没提评奖标准，属于错误目的；D 与通告精神相反，通告明确鼓励表演艺术等各学院学生参加。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about a student who lists a faculty sponsor on the abstract?

options.A: The student has already completed all of the project's results
options.B: The student will automatically be exempted from the noon deadline
options.C: The student has arranged for that professor to review the poster first
options.D: The student must major in the same department as that professor

questions.explanation: 通告说摘要列出的教师赞助人需事先同意审阅海报，因此可推断列出赞助人意味着已安排该教师先行审阅，C 正确。A 过度推断，通告明说无需完成结果即可申请；B 无任何依据，截止时间对所有人一致；D 通告并未要求与教师同系，属无关推断。

items.situation: study abroad information session with returned students
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. The Global Programs Office is hosting a study abroad information session this Thursday at four o'clock in the Lincoln Hall lounge. We're bringing together advisors and a panel of classmates who just got back from a semester overseas, so you'll hear what daily life and coursework were really like. We'll walk through application steps, course credit, and the funding options that make these programs affordable. The session is open to every major and every class year, and no sign-up is needed. If you can't make it, please pick up the printed program guide available at the front desk afterward.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To collect applications for next semester's overseas programs
options.B: To invite students to a study abroad information session
options.C: To announce that course credit rules for travel have changed
options.D: To recruit students who have returned to lead future trips

questions.explanation: 通告目的是邀请学生参加留学信息说明会，B 正确。A 通告并非现场收取申请，而是介绍流程，属错误目的；C 通告只是会上讲解学分，并未宣布规则变更，属错误目的；D 通告说归国学生是分享经验的嘉宾，并非招募他们带队，属错误目的。

questions.stem: What does the speaker say students should do if they cannot attend?

options.A: Email the Global Programs Office for a recording
options.B: Sign up online for the next available session
options.C: Speak directly with a returned student panelist
options.D: Pick up a printed program guide at the front desk

questions.explanation: 通告明确说不能到场者可事后到前台领取打印的项目指南，D 正确。A 通告从未提到录像或发邮件，属未提及内容；B 通告说无需报名，且未提下一场报名，属未提及内容；C 嘉宾是说明会上的分享者，通告没说缺席者可单独找他们交谈，属张冠李戴。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Because of utility construction along Maple Drive, the Blue Line shuttle will follow a temporary route beginning this Monday and continuing through the end of the month. During this period the shuttle will not stop at the Maple Drive shelter; instead, riders should board at the relocated stop in front of the Engineering Annex. To keep schedules reliable, buses will run every twenty minutes rather than the usual fifteen. We've added a single late-evening trip at eleven o'clock to help students leaving the library. Real-time arrival updates remain available through the campus transit app, which we strongly encourage everyone to check before heading out.

questions.stem: Where should riders board the Blue Line shuttle during the construction period?

options.A: At the usual Maple Drive shelter as before
options.B: At any stop along the original utility route
options.C: At the relocated stop by the Engineering Annex
options.D: At the main library entrance after eleven o'clock

questions.explanation: 通告明确说临时期间应在工程附楼前的临时站上车，C 正确。A 与事实相反，Maple Drive 站正是停用的站点；B 通告说沿 Maple Drive 施工，不存在沿原线随处上车，属改动事实；D 把十一点的晚班车与图书馆离馆者混为上车地点，属张冠李戴。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the change to a twenty-minute interval?

options.A: The detour makes each loop take longer than the normal route
options.B: The shuttle will permanently keep this new timing after the month
options.C: Ridership on the Blue Line has dropped sharply this semester
options.D: The transit app will stop showing real-time arrivals during construction

questions.explanation: 通告说为保证准点，班次由 15 分钟改为 20 分钟，结合绕行可推断绕行使每趟耗时更长，A 正确。B 通告说只持续到月底，属过度推断；C 通告毫无客流下降的依据，属无关推断；D 通告明说实时到站信息仍可在 app 查看，与之相反。

items.situation: financial aid office workshop on scholarship applications
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the Financial Aid Office is running a scholarship application workshop next Tuesday at three o'clock in Room 118 of Bursar Hall. We'll show you how to find scholarships you actually qualify for and how to write a personal statement that stands out. Bring a laptop and an unofficial copy of your transcript, since we'll start a real application together during the session. We're also pairing each attendee with a peer mentor who has won a major award, so you'll have someone to ask questions afterward. Seats are limited to thirty, so reserve yours through the financial aid portal before Monday.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce that several scholarship deadlines have been extended
options.B: To recruit award-winning students to work as paid mentors
options.C: To explain why financial aid funding was reduced this year
options.D: To invite students to a hands-on scholarship application workshop

questions.explanation: 通告目的是邀请学生参加手把手的奖学金申请工作坊，D 正确。A 通告从未提及延长截止日期，属错误目的；B 获奖学生是作为同伴导师陪伴参与者，通告没说招募有薪导师，属错误目的；C 通告毫无削减资助的内容，属错误目的。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker tell students to bring a laptop and a transcript?

options.A: Because attendees must submit a final application before leaving
options.B: Because the workshop will begin filling out a real application on the spot
options.C: Because seating will be assigned based on each student's grades
options.D: Because the office cannot access student records electronically

questions.explanation: 通告说带电脑和成绩单是因为现场会一起开始填写真实申请，故 B 正确。A 通告说当场开始填写，并未要求离场前提交最终申请，属过度推断；C 座位与成绩无关，纯属无关推断；D 通告没有任何系统无法调取记录的说法，属无关推断。

items.situation: campus bookstore moving to a new building
items.announcement: Attention students and staff. The campus bookstore is moving to its new home on the ground floor of the Student Union starting next Monday. The old location in Harper Hall will close this Friday at five o'clock so staff can pack and transfer inventory over the weekend. The new store offers a larger textbook section, a coffee counter, and longer evening hours. While the shelves are being moved, all online orders will still ship on time without interruption. Please note that any textbook rentals due this week should be returned to the new Student Union location, not the old one.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform the campus that the bookstore is relocating
options.B: To advertise a new coffee counter opening on campus
options.C: To apologize for a delay in shipping online orders
options.D: To encourage students to rent rather than buy textbooks

questions.explanation: 通告核心是告知书店搬迁到学生中心，A 正确。B 咖啡台只是新店的附带特色，把它当主旨属以偏概全；C 通告明说线上订单照常按时发货，并无延误致歉，属错误目的；D 通告只是说明租书归还地点，并未鼓励租书，属错误目的。

questions.stem: Where should students return textbook rentals due this week?

options.A: To the old Harper Hall location before Friday
options.B: To any campus library drop box over the weekend
options.C: To the new bookstore in the Student Union
options.D: By mailing them back through the online order system

questions.explanation: 通告明确说本周到期的租书应归还到学生中心的新店，C 正确。A 与事实相反，Harper Hall 旧址周五关闭，不应在此归还，属改动事实；B 通告从未提到图书馆投递箱，属未提及内容；D 通告说线上订单照常发货，与归还租书无关，属张冠李戴。

items.situation: main library third floor closed for HVAC repair
items.announcement: Good morning, students. Please be aware that the third floor of the main library will be closed starting this Wednesday for emergency repairs to the heating and cooling system. The closure is expected to last through Friday afternoon, so we ask that you plan your study sessions accordingly. During this time, the group study rooms on the third floor will be unavailable, but you're welcome to reserve the rooms on the second floor instead. All books normally shelved on the third floor have been temporarily moved to the basement level. If you need help locating a specific title, please ask a librarian at the front desk. We appreciate your patience while we keep the building comfortable for everyone.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To advertise newly renovated study rooms
options.B: To inform students about a temporary floor closure
options.C: To announce permanent changes to library hours
options.D: To recruit volunteers for a book relocation

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告核心是告知三楼因供暖制冷系统维修将临时关闭，并说明相关安排。A错（too_narrow）：二楼房间只是替代方案的一个细节，并非整体目的，且房间是“可预约”而非“新装修”。C错（wrong_purpose）：关闭是临时的（周三到周五），不是永久改变开放时间。D错（reversed_intent）：书籍已被搬走，公告并未招募搬书志愿者，方向相反。

questions.stem: Where have the third-floor books been moved?

options.A: To the second-floor study rooms
options.B: To the basement level
options.C: To the front desk for pickup
options.D: To another campus library

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告明确说三楼原本上架的书已临时搬到地下室（basement level）。A错（misattributed_detail）：二楼是用来预约自习室的，不是放书的地方。C错（wrong_detail）：前台是询问图书位置的地方，书籍本身并未搬到前台供取阅。D错（related_but_not_stated）：公告从未提到把书转移到校园其他图书馆。

items.situation: dining hall switching to reduced spring break hours
items.announcement: Attention students. As spring break approaches, the Hillcrest Dining Hall will be operating on a reduced schedule from next Monday through the following Sunday. During this period, the dining hall will serve only lunch and dinner, with breakfast service suspended for the entire week. Lunch will run from 11 a.m. to 1:30 p.m., and dinner from 5 p.m. to 7 p.m. Please note that the weekend brunch buffet will not be available during the break. Students remaining on campus who rely on a meal plan can pick up grab-and-go breakfast bags from the Student Center lobby each morning until 10 a.m. Regular dining hours will resume the Monday after break ends.

questions.stem: Which meal service is suspended during spring break?

options.A: Lunch on weekdays
options.B: Dinner on weekends
options.C: Breakfast for the whole week
options.D: The grab-and-go bags

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：公告明确说整周早餐服务暂停（breakfast service suspended for the entire week）。A错（wrong_detail）：午餐照常供应，时间为11点到1点半。B错（wrong_detail）：晚餐照常供应，5点到7点，并未取消。D错（reversed_intent）：grab-and-go早餐袋是关闭期间提供的替代品，恰恰是可用的，不是被取消的。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who stay on campus during the break?

options.A: They must cook their own breakfast
options.B: They can still get a morning meal option
options.C: They are charged extra for dinner
options.D: They eat all meals at the Student Center

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：虽然食堂早餐暂停，但留校学生可在学生中心领取grab-and-go早餐袋，可推断他们仍能获得一份早晨餐食。A错（over_inference）：公告提供了打包早餐，无需自己做饭，推得太远。C错（unrelated_inference）：公告完全没提晚餐加收费用，毫无依据。D错（wrong_detail）：学生中心只提供早餐袋，午餐和晚餐仍在食堂，并非所有餐食都在学生中心。

items.situation: new printing quota and pay-per-page policy in computer labs
items.announcement: This is a reminder that, beginning next semester, the university is introducing a new printing policy across all computer labs. Each enrolled student will receive a free quota of three hundred black-and-white pages per semester, after which printing will be charged at five cents per page. Color printing is not included in the free quota and will be billed separately from the start. We're making this change to reduce paper waste, which has risen sharply over the past two years. To check your remaining balance, you'll log in to the printing portal using your student ID number. Any unused pages, please note, will not roll over into the following semester.

questions.stem: What is true about the new printing quota?

options.A: It covers three hundred free color pages
options.B: It applies only to graduate students
options.C: It gives free black-and-white pages each semester
options.D: It carries unused pages into the next term

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：公告说每位注册学生每学期获得300页黑白免费额度。A错（wrong_detail）：免费额度只针对黑白打印，彩色打印从一开始就单独收费。B错（related_but_not_stated）：政策面向所有注册学生，公告从未限定只对研究生。D错（reversed_intent）：公告明确说未使用页数不会结转到下学期，与该选项相反。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker mention the rise in paper waste?

options.A: To explain the reason for the new policy
options.B: To praise students for recycling efforts
options.C: To announce a new campus garden project
options.D: To warn that labs will close early

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：说话者提到纸张浪费在过去两年急剧上升，是为了解释为什么要推出这项打印新政策。B错（reversed_intent）：公告是在指出浪费问题，而非表扬学生的回收行为。C错（unrelated_inference）：完全没提校园花园项目，毫无关联。D错（over_inference）：公告从未说机房会提前关闭，属于过度推断。

items.situation: deadline to apply for on-campus housing for next year
items.announcement: Attention students. The Office of Residential Life would like to remind everyone that the deadline to apply for on-campus housing for the next academic year is this Friday, March fifteenth, at 11:59 p.m. To be eligible for the room selection lottery, you must submit both your housing application and the two-hundred-dollar deposit by that time. Students who miss this deadline will not be guaranteed a room and will be placed on a waiting list instead. Returning students hoping to keep their current room should select the renewal option within the online portal. If you have questions about roommate groups, stop by our office in Curtis Hall before Thursday.

questions.stem: What must students do to enter the room selection lottery?

options.A: Submit the application and the deposit on time
options.B: Visit Curtis Hall in person before Friday
options.C: Join a roommate group online
options.D: Renew their current room assignment

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：公告说要进入选房抽签，必须在截止前同时提交住宿申请和200美元押金。B错（misattributed_detail）：去Curtis Hall是为了咨询室友组问题，不是进入抽签的条件。C错（related_but_not_stated）：公告提到室友组的咨询，但从未把“加入室友组”列为进入抽签的要求。D错（wrong_detail）：续租选项是给想保留原房间的返校生的，与进入抽签是不同的路径。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who miss the Friday deadline?

options.A: They will receive a full refund of the deposit
options.B: They may not get on-campus housing right away
options.C: They are barred from living on campus permanently
options.D: They automatically keep their current room

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告说错过截止日期的学生不保证有房间，会被放到等候名单，可推断他们不一定能立刻获得校内住宿。A错（unrelated_inference）：公告完全没提退还押金的事，毫无依据。C错（over_inference）：被放到等候名单不等于永久禁止住校，推断过头。D错（reversed_intent）：自动保留原房间需要主动选择续租选项，错过截止反而不被保证，方向相反。

items.situation: campus blood drive hosted by the health center
items.announcement: Good afternoon, everyone. The Campus Health Center is excited to announce that our annual blood drive will take place next Tuesday in Memorial Hall from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. The regional blood bank will be on site, and every donation can help save up to three lives in our local community. To donate, you must be at least seventeen years old and bring a photo ID. We recommend eating a full meal and drinking plenty of water beforehand so you feel your best. Walk-ins are welcome, but to skip the line, you can reserve a time slot on the health center's website. Everyone who donates will receive a free t-shirt as a thank-you.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A free health screening for new students
options.B: An upcoming campus blood donation event
options.C: A fundraising sale of charity t-shirts
options.D: A first-aid training course in Memorial Hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告整体是宣布健康中心一年一度的献血活动及相关安排。A错（wrong_purpose）：这是献血活动，不是为新生做健康筛查。C错（too_narrow）：免费T恤只是献血者的小礼物，不是义卖募捐，把细节夸大成主题。D错（misattributed_detail）：Memorial Hall是献血地点，公告并未提供任何急救培训课程。

questions.stem: What are donors recommended to do beforehand?

options.A: Bring a friend to donate with them
options.B: Eat a full meal and drink water
options.C: Pay a small registration fee
options.D: Complete an online health survey

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告建议献血前吃一顿正餐并多喝水，以保持良好状态。A错（related_but_not_stated）：公告没有建议带朋友一起来，纯属未提内容。C错（wrong_detail）：献血是免费的，从未提到任何报名费。D错（related_but_not_stated）：网站只用于预约时间段，公告并未要求填写在线健康问卷。

items.situation: new late-night campus safety escort service launching
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Campus Public Safety is pleased to announce a new late-night walking escort service beginning this Sunday. If you're on campus after dark and would prefer not to walk alone, a trained student officer will accompany you to your residence hall, parking lot, or the shuttle stop. The service runs every night from 8 p.m. until 2 a.m. To request an escort, simply call the dispatch line or use the request button in the campus safety app. We ask that you allow about ten minutes for an escort to reach you. This free service is part of our ongoing effort to make everyone feel safer on campus.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To introduce a new nighttime walking escort service
options.B: To report a recent rise in campus crime
options.C: To extend the operating hours of the shuttle
options.D: To recruit students as paid security guards

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：公告核心是介绍公共安全部门即将推出的深夜步行护送服务及使用方式。B错（wrong_purpose）：公告意在提供安全服务，并未报告或提及校园犯罪率上升。C错（misattributed_detail）：班车站只是护送可达的目的地之一，公告并未延长班车运营时间。D错（reversed_intent）：服务由受过训练的学生护送员提供，但公告是宣布服务、并非招募付费保安。

questions.stem: How can students request a walking escort?

options.A: By signing up at the residence hall desk
options.B: By emailing the public safety office
options.C: By calling dispatch or using the safety app
options.D: By waiting at the nearest shuttle stop

questions.explanation: 正确答案C：公告说请求护送只需拨打调度电话或使用校园安全app里的请求按钮。A错（related_but_not_stated）：宿舍楼前台从未被提及为请求方式。B错（related_but_not_stated）：公告没有提供发邮件给安全办公室这一渠道。D错（misattributed_detail）：班车站是护送可送达的地点之一，并不是请求护送的方式。

items.situation: campus gym pool closed for resurfacing
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. We'd like to let you know that the swimming pool at the Recreation Center will be closed for resurfacing from this Monday through the end of the month. The locker rooms and fitness floor will stay open as usual, so you can still use the weights and cardio machines during this time. All scheduled swim classes and lap-swim hours are canceled until the pool reopens. For those who'd like to keep swimming, the city aquatic center two blocks away is offering free guest passes to our students if you show your campus ID. We're sorry for the inconvenience and look forward to welcoming you back to a fresh new pool soon.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To promote new fitness machines at the gym
options.B: To notify students that the pool will close temporarily
options.C: To announce a partnership with the city aquatic center
options.D: To cancel all membership at the Recreation Center

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告主要告知游泳池将因翻新临时关闭，并说明替代安排。A错（misattributed_detail）：力量和有氧器械只是仍可使用的部分，并非推广新器械。C错（too_narrow）：市游泳中心的免费通行证只是一个替代细节，不是公告的整体目的。D错（reversed_intent）：只有游泳池关闭，其他设施照常开放，并非取消所有会员资格，方向相反。

questions.stem: What can students do to keep swimming during the closure?

options.A: Use the fitness floor and cardio machines
options.B: Show their campus ID at the city aquatic center
options.C: Sign up for rescheduled swim classes online
options.D: Swim in the pool during limited morning hours

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告说想继续游泳的学生可凭校园ID到两个街区外的市游泳中心使用免费访客通行证。A错（misattributed_detail）：健身区和有氧器械可用，但那是健身不是游泳，张冠李戴。C错（related_but_not_stated）：所有游泳课都被取消，公告从未提供线上改期报名。D错（wrong_detail）：泳池在关闭期间完全不开放，并没有所谓限时晨间开放。

items.situation: campus health clinic moving to appointment-only hours
items.announcement: This is a reminder that, starting next Monday, the Student Health Clinic will be switching from walk-in service to an appointment-only system. To see a doctor or nurse, you'll need to book a visit in advance through the patient portal or by calling the clinic during office hours. Same-day appointments will still be available for urgent concerns, but they tend to fill up quickly in the morning. The clinic will continue its regular hours, open weekdays from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. Please remember to bring your insurance card and arrive ten minutes early to complete any paperwork. For after-hours emergencies, you should still go directly to the county hospital.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A change to an appointment-only booking system
options.B: An extension of the clinic's weekday hours
options.C: The opening of a new clinic location on campus
options.D: A new insurance requirement for all students

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：公告核心是宣布学生健康诊所从无预约接诊改为仅限预约的就诊系统。B错（wrong_detail）：诊所保持原有工作时间（工作日8点到5点），并未延长。C错（wrong_purpose）：公告完全没提开设新诊所地点。D错（misattributed_detail）：带保险卡只是就诊提醒中的一项，公告并未引入面向所有学生的新保险要求。

questions.stem: What are students advised to do before their appointment?

options.A: Pay the visit fee through the portal
options.B: Arrive early with their insurance card
options.C: Email their symptoms to a nurse
options.D: Visit the county hospital first

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告提醒学生带上保险卡并提前十分钟到达以完成相关手续。A错（related_but_not_stated）：portal用于预约，公告从未提到通过portal缴纳就诊费。C错（related_but_not_stated）：公告没有要求把症状发邮件给护士这一步骤。D错（misattributed_detail）：去县医院是针对“非工作时间的急诊”，并不是就诊前应做的事，张冠李戴。

items.situation: deadline to return library textbooks before summer
items.announcement: Attention students. As the semester comes to a close, the library would like to remind you that all borrowed textbooks and reserve materials are due back by Friday, May tenth. Items returned after this date will accrue a late fee of one dollar per day, up to the full replacement cost of the book. You can drop off your books at the main circulation desk or use the outdoor return bin near the east entrance, which is available around the clock. Graduating seniors, please note that any outstanding library balance must be cleared before your diploma can be released. If you'd like to renew a book for summer research, you can do so once through your online account.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce extended library hours for finals
options.B: To remind students to return borrowed books by a deadline
options.C: To introduce a new online renewal system
options.D: To advertise a used-textbook sale at the library

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告主要提醒学生在5月10日前归还借阅的教材和指定参考资料，并说明逾期后果。A错（wrong_purpose）：公告完全没提期末延长开放时间。C错（too_narrow）：在线续借只是结尾提到的一个细节选项，并非整体目的，且系统并非“新推出”。D错（wrong_purpose）：公告没有任何二手教材义卖的内容。

questions.stem: What is true about returning books after May tenth?

options.A: Returns are no longer accepted at all
options.B: A late fee of one dollar per day applies
options.C: Books can only be returned at the east entrance
options.D: A flat replacement fee is charged immediately

questions.explanation: 正确答案B：公告说5月10日之后归还的书每天收取1美元滞纳金，上限为整本书的赔偿价。A错（reversed_intent）：逾期仍可归还，只是要交滞纳金，并非完全不接受归还。C错（wrong_detail）：东门外的还书箱只是其中一个归还点，主流通台也可归还，并非唯一渠道。D错（wrong_detail）：滞纳金是按天累计、最高才到赔偿价，而非一逾期就立即收取固定赔偿费。

items.situation: professor announcing a guest lecture in class
items.announcement: Before we begin today, I'm pleased to announce that we'll have a guest speaker joining us next Thursday during our regular class time. Dr. Elena Ruiz, a marine biologist who's spent the last decade studying coral reef recovery, will be presenting her fieldwork from the Pacific. I'd really encourage you to attend, since the material connects directly to the unit on ecosystems we'll be wrapping up this week. There won't be a quiz that day, but I will expect you to submit one thoughtful question for Dr. Ruiz through our course page by Wednesday evening. We'll be meeting in the larger lecture hall in Bryant Building rather than our usual room, so don't show up here by mistake.

questions.stem: What does the professor require students to do before Thursday?

options.A: Submit a question for the guest speaker online
options.B: Read Dr. Ruiz's published research paper
options.C: Prepare for a quiz on ecosystems
options.D: Sign up to attend in the lecture hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：教授要求学生在周三晚前通过课程页面提交一个有思考的问题给Ruiz博士。B错（related_but_not_stated）：公告提到她的实地研究，但从未要求学生阅读她发表的论文。C错（reversed_intent）：教授明确说那天不会有测验，与该选项相反。D错（wrong_detail）：教授鼓励参加并告知改到Bryant楼的大讲堂，但并未要求报名登记。

questions.stem: Why does the professor mention the unit on ecosystems?

options.A: To explain why attending the talk is worthwhile
options.B: To announce that the unit deadline has been delayed
options.C: To warn that the lecture will be very difficult
options.D: To remind students of an upcoming final exam

questions.explanation: 正确答案A：教授提到本周即将结束的生态系统单元，是为了说明这场讲座与课程内容直接相关、因此值得去听。B错（over_inference）：公告说本周“收尾”该单元，但从未说单元截止日期被推迟。C错（unrelated_inference）：教授并未对讲座难度做任何评价，毫无依据。D错（unrelated_inference）：公告完全没提期末考试，属于无关推断。

items.situation: career fair preparation workshop with resume review
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. With the Fall Career Fair just two weeks away, the Career Services Office is hosting a preparation workshop this Thursday at 4 p.m. in Hartley Hall, Room 210. We'll cover how to research employers, polish your elevator pitch, and dress professionally for interviews. If you'd like a one-on-one resume review during the session, you must email a copy of your resume to our office by Wednesday at noon so an advisor can read it in advance. Walk-ins are welcome for the general workshop, but the individual reviews are limited to those who submit early. Don't miss this chance to stand out before the big day.

questions.stem: What must students do to receive a one-on-one resume review?

options.A: Email their resume by Wednesday at noon
options.B: Sign up on the Career Services website
options.C: Arrive early to the Thursday workshop
options.D: Bring a printed resume to Hartley Hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告明确说想获得一对一简历点评的学生必须在周三中午前把简历发邮件给办公室，让顾问提前阅读。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告从未提到在网站上报名，报名渠道是邮箱。C错误（misattributed_detail）：早到只对一般工作坊的walk-in有意义，但简历点评要求的是提前提交，不是早到。D错误（wrong_detail）：公告要求发送电子版简历，并未要求带纸质简历到现场。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the individual resume reviews?

options.A: They are open to all who attend the workshop
options.B: They will be conducted after the career fair
options.C: Advisors prepare before meeting each student
options.D: They cost an additional registration fee

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告说要提前发简历好让顾问能事先阅读，由此可推断顾问会在见学生之前做准备。A错误（reversed_intent）：公告明说个人点评仅限提前提交的人，并非对所有参加者开放。B错误（wrong_detail）：点评是在周四工作坊期间进行，而非工作展结束后。D错误（over_inference）：公告完全没有提到任何费用，属于过度推断。

items.situation: campus dining hall switching to summer hours
items.announcement: Attention students and staff. Now that final exams have ended, the Riverside Dining Hall will be moving to its summer schedule beginning next Monday. From then on, we'll serve breakfast from 8 to 10 a.m. and dinner from 5 to 7 p.m., but lunch service will be suspended entirely until the fall term resumes. Please be aware that the smaller café in the library annex will stay open midday for anyone needing a meal between classes or summer research. Meal plan balances from the spring semester will not carry over, so be sure to use any remaining funds before Friday. We appreciate your patience as we adjust to the quieter summer pace.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To apologize for closing the dining hall permanently
options.B: To inform students of the dining hall's summer hours
options.C: To promote the café in the library annex
options.D: To explain how meal plans are purchased

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告核心是通知Riverside餐厅从下周一起改用暑期作息，包括取消午餐、调整早晚餐时间。A错误（reversed_intent）：餐厅只是改为暑期时间，并非永久关闭，方向相反。C错误（too_narrow）：图书馆附楼咖啡馆只是顺带提到的替代选择，不是公告主旨。D错误（wrong_purpose）：公告讲的是春季餐费余额到期，而非如何购买餐费计划。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker mention the café in the library annex?

options.A: Because it is replacing the dining hall in fall
options.B: Because it offers cheaper meals than the dining hall
options.C: Because it extends its hours for the summer
options.D: Because the dining hall no longer serves lunch

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告说暑期午餐服务完全停止，紧接着提到咖啡馆中午仍开放，可推断提它是为午间没饭吃的人提供替代选择。A错误（over_inference）：公告从未说秋季咖啡馆会取代餐厅，餐厅秋季会恢复。B错误（unrelated_inference）：公告没有比较两者价格，价格更便宜毫无依据。C错误（wrong_detail）：公告说的是咖啡馆中午保持开放，并未说它延长了营业时间。

items.situation: annual outdoor movie night with blanket seating
items.announcement: Hello, everyone. The Student Activities Board is thrilled to invite you to our annual Outdoor Movie Night this Saturday on the Quad lawn. The film begins at sunset, around 8:30 p.m., but we encourage you to arrive by 8 to find a good spot. Since seating is on the grass, please bring your own blanket or a low folding chair to sit on. We'll have free popcorn and lemonade available near the projector while supplies last. In case of rain, the event will move indoors to the Student Union ballroom, so check our social media that afternoon for any updates. We can't wait to see you there.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain how to join the Student Activities Board
options.B: To announce a change to the Quad's lawn hours
options.C: To invite students to an outdoor movie night
options.D: To remind students about a rainy weather policy

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告主旨是邀请大家参加本周六在草坪上举办的年度户外电影之夜。A错误（wrong_purpose）：公告没有讲如何加入学生活动委员会。B错误（too_narrow）：公告未涉及草坪的开放时间变更。D错误（too_narrow）：雨天改室内只是末尾的一个细节提醒，不是整条公告的目的。

questions.stem: What are students asked to bring to the event?

options.A: A blanket or a low folding chair
options.B: Their own popcorn and lemonade
options.C: A valid student ID card
options.D: An umbrella in case of rain

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告说因为是在草地上就座，请大家自带毯子或低折叠椅。B错误（wrong_detail）：爆米花和柠檬水是现场免费提供的，不需要自带。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告没有提到需要出示学生证。D错误（misattributed_detail）：公告提到下雨会改到室内，但并未要求学生带伞。

items.situation: health insurance enrollment information session
items.announcement: Good morning, students. This is a reminder that the Student Health Office will hold an information session on enrolling in the university health insurance plan this Wednesday at 3 p.m. in the Wellness Center lobby. An advisor will walk you through the coverage options, explain how to waive the plan if you already have insurance, and answer your questions. To complete the waiver, you'll need to bring proof of your existing coverage, such as an insurance card or a letter from your provider. The enrollment deadline is September 30th, and students who miss it will be automatically enrolled in the standard plan. Feel free to drop by; no appointment is necessary.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a change to the health insurance plan
options.B: To remind students to visit the Wellness Center
options.C: To explain why the standard plan is the best choice
options.D: To inform students about a health insurance session

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告主旨是告知学生本周三将举办关于大学医保计划报名的信息说明会。A错误（wrong_purpose）：公告没有说医保计划本身有任何变动。B错误（too_narrow）：去健康中心只是地点，不是公告目的。C错误（wrong_purpose）：公告只是中立介绍各选项，并未论证标准计划最好。

questions.stem: What do students need to bring in order to waive the plan?

options.A: A completed enrollment form
options.B: Proof of their existing coverage
options.C: A payment for the standard plan
options.D: A signed letter from an advisor

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告明确说要办理豁免，需要带上现有保险的证明，如保险卡或保险公司的证明信。A错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告没有提到要带填好的报名表。C错误（misattributed_detail）：标准计划是错过截止日期后被自动加入的，不涉及现场付款。D错误（wrong_detail）：需要的是保险公司出具的信，而不是顾问签字的信。

items.situation: senior capstone presentation schedule
items.announcement: Attention senior students. The Engineering Department has finalized the schedule for this year's capstone presentations, which will take place over three days, from Tuesday through Thursday next week, in the Patterson Building. Each team has been assigned a forty-minute slot, and the full schedule is now posted outside the department office and on the course portal. Please note that while attendance at your own session is mandatory, you are also expected to attend at least two other teams' presentations as part of your participation grade. Faculty evaluators will arrive promptly, so teams should set up their equipment fifteen minutes before their assigned time. A brief reception with light refreshments will follow on Thursday afternoon.

questions.stem: What are seniors required to do besides presenting their own project?

options.A: Attend at least two other teams' presentations
options.B: Submit a written report to faculty evaluators
options.C: Sign up for a forty-minute presentation slot
options.D: Help organize the Thursday reception

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告说除了自己的展示必须出席外，作为参与成绩的一部分，还要至少观看另外两个团队的展示。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告提到有教师评委，但从未要求提交书面报告。C错误（wrong_detail）：四十分钟的时段是已经分配好的，学生不需要自己报名选时段。D错误（misattributed_detail）：周四确有招待会，但公告没有要求学生帮忙筹办。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker mention that faculty evaluators will arrive promptly?

options.A: To explain why the schedule was posted late
options.B: To warn that presentations may run overtime
options.C: To stress that teams should set up in advance
options.D: To suggest that evaluators are very strict graders

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。提到评委会准时到场，紧接着要求团队提前十五分钟布置设备，可推断这是在强调团队需提前准备好以免耽误。A错误（unrelated_inference）：公告没有说日程发布得晚，也未把准时与发布时间联系起来。B错误（over_inference）：公告并未暗示展示会超时，反而是要求按时开始。D错误（over_inference）：从准时到场推不出评委打分严格，属过度推断。

items.situation: recreation center temporarily closing the weight room for new equipment installation
items.announcement: Attention all rec center members. The main weight room on the second floor will be closed from this Monday through Wednesday while we install a new set of strength-training machines. During the closure, free weights and cardio equipment on the first floor will remain fully available, and the upstairs studios will continue hosting their regular fitness classes. We've also arranged extended hours at the smaller annex gym in Lawson Hall, which will open at 6 a.m. on those three days. Members who had personal training sessions booked for the weight room have already been contacted to reschedule. The renovated space should reopen Thursday morning with all-new equipment.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A temporary closure of the weight room for new equipment
options.B: A permanent relocation of the recreation center
options.C: A new schedule for upstairs fitness classes
options.D: A cancellation of all personal training sessions

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告主旨是二楼力量训练区周一至周三临时关闭以安装新器械。B错误（reversed_intent）：器械区只是临时关闭三天，并非整个活动中心永久搬迁。C错误（too_narrow）：楼上健身课照常进行只是附带信息，不是主旨。D错误（wrong_detail）：原本约在器械区的私教课是被重新安排，而非全部取消。

questions.stem: What is true about the annex gym in Lawson Hall during the closure?

options.A: It will open earlier than usual
options.B: It will host all the displaced fitness classes
options.C: It will be reserved for personal training only
options.D: It will close along with the weight room

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告说Lawson Hall附属健身房在这三天延长开放时间，早上6点就开门，比平时更早。B错误（misattributed_detail）：健身课照常在楼上工作室进行，并未转移到附属健身房。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告没有说附属健身房只供私教使用。D错误（reversed_intent）：附属健身房不是跟着关闭，而是延长开放作为替代场所。

items.situation: registrar moving the final exam period one day earlier due to a campus holiday
items.announcement: This is an important notice from the Registrar's Office regarding the upcoming final exam period. Because of the newly added campus holiday on Friday, December 8th, the entire exam schedule has been shifted one day earlier than originally published. Exams will now run from Monday, December 4th, through Thursday, December 7th. We strongly encourage you to log in to the student portal and reconfirm the new date, time, and room for each of your exams, as some locations have changed as well. If you discover a conflict between two exams under the revised schedule, contact your instructor before this Friday to arrange an alternate sitting. The updated calendar is already available online.

questions.stem: Why has the final exam schedule been changed?

options.A: Because a new campus holiday was added
options.B: Because too many exam rooms were unavailable
options.C: Because students requested an earlier start
options.D: Because of a conflict with graduation ceremonies

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告说由于12月8日周五新增了校园假日，整个考试日程提前了一天。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告提到部分考场有变，但变更原因是假日，而非考场不够用。C错误（wrong_detail）：是学校因假日调整，并非学生要求提前。D错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告完全没有提到毕业典礼。

questions.stem: What are students advised to do because of the change?

options.A: Reconfirm each exam's date, time, and room online
options.B: Pick up a printed schedule from the Registrar
options.C: Reschedule all of their exams with instructors
options.D: Wait for an email before checking the portal

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告建议学生登录学生门户，重新确认每场考试的新日期、时间和教室，因为有些考场也变了。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告说更新日历已在线提供，并未让学生去注册办公室领纸质表。C错误（wrong_detail）：只有发现两场考试冲突时才需联系老师，而非把所有考试都重新安排。D错误（reversed_intent）：公告让学生主动登录门户核对，而不是等邮件。

items.situation: library introducing a new quiet-study policy on the upper floors
items.announcement: Good afternoon. The University Library is introducing a new quiet-study policy that takes effect this coming Monday. Beginning then, the third and fourth floors will be designated as silent zones, where all phone calls, group discussions, and laptop audio are prohibited. Students who wish to study together or hold group meetings should instead use the bookable study rooms on the first floor, which can be reserved through the library's website. To help everyone adjust, staff will be stationed on the upper floors during the first week to answer questions and offer gentle reminders. We believe these changes will create a more focused environment, especially as midterm season approaches.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a new quiet-study policy in the library
options.B: To remind students to reserve study rooms early
options.C: To explain why the library is extending its hours
options.D: To recruit student staff for the upper floors

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告主旨是图书馆将从下周一起实施新的安静自习政策，把三、四楼设为静音区。B错误（too_narrow）：预订一楼研讨室只是替代方案中的一个细节，不是公告目的。C错误（wrong_purpose）：公告完全没有提到延长开放时间。D错误（wrong_purpose）：工作人员会驻守楼层是为答疑提醒，公告并非在招募学生员工。

questions.stem: Where should students go if they want to study in a group?

options.A: The bookable study rooms on the first floor
options.B: The silent zones on the third and fourth floors
options.C: Any open table during the first week only
options.D: The library website's virtual meeting space

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告说想一起学习或开小组会的学生应改用一楼可预订的研讨室。B错误（reversed_intent）：三、四楼恰恰是禁止小组讨论的静音区，方向相反。C错误（misattributed_detail）：第一周只是工作人员驻守答疑的时段，与小组学习地点无关。D错误（wrong_detail）：网站是用来预订实体研讨室的，并非提供线上虚拟会议空间。

items.situation: international food festival hosted by cultural student organizations
items.announcement: Hi, everyone. The Coalition of Cultural Clubs is excited to host our first International Food Festival this Friday afternoon on the Memorial Plaza. From noon until 4 p.m., more than a dozen student groups will set up booths serving dishes from their home countries, all completely free for you to sample. There will also be live music and traditional dance performances throughout the afternoon on the main stage. If you'd like to volunteer at a booth or perform, just fill out the short form linked on our club's Instagram page by Wednesday. Please remember to bring your own reusable water bottle, since we're trying to keep the event waste-free. Come hungry and curious!

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To invite students to an international food festival
options.B: To recruit new members for the cultural clubs
options.C: To announce a fundraiser for international students
options.D: To advertise a cooking class series on campus

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告主旨是邀请大家参加本周五在纪念广场举办的首届国际美食节。B错误（wrong_purpose）：公告招募的是当天活动的志愿者和表演者，而非俱乐部新成员。C错误（wrong_purpose）：食物完全免费品尝，活动并非筹款。D错误（wrong_purpose）：这是一次美食节活动，不是烹饪课程系列。

questions.stem: What are attendees asked to bring to the festival?

options.A: A reusable water bottle
options.B: A dish from their home country
options.C: Cash to purchase food samples
options.D: A completed volunteer form

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告请大家自带可重复使用的水瓶，因为活动力求做到零废弃。B错误（misattributed_detail）：摆摊提供家乡菜的是各学生社团，普通参加者不需要带菜。C错误（wrong_detail）：所有食物都是免费品尝的，不需要带现金。D错误（misattributed_detail）：只有想做志愿者或表演的人才需提前填表，普通参加者无需如此。

items.situation: graduate school reminding students of the thesis submission deadline for spring graduation
items.announcement: Attention graduate students planning to graduate this spring. The Graduate School wishes to remind you that the final deadline to submit your completed thesis for format review is Friday, April 5th, at 5 p.m. Submissions must be uploaded as a single PDF through the online thesis portal; emailed copies will not be accepted under any circumstances. Keep in mind that the format review is separate from your committee's approval of the content, which must be secured beforehand. If revisions are requested after the format check, you will have one week to make corrections and resubmit. Students who miss the April 5th deadline will need to postpone their graduation to the summer term.

questions.stem: How must students submit their thesis for format review?

options.A: As a single PDF through the online portal
options.B: By emailing a copy to the Graduate School
options.C: As a printed document delivered in person
options.D: Through their committee chair's account

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告明确说论文必须以单个PDF文件通过在线论文门户上传。B错误（reversed_intent）：公告特别强调任何情况下都不接受邮件提交，方向相反。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告没有提到纸质文件或当面递交。D错误（related_but_not_stated）：上传通过学生自己的在线门户完成，公告未提及用委员会主席的账户。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the committee's approval of the thesis content?

options.A: It is granted automatically after the format review
options.B: It must be completed before the format review
options.C: It can be obtained during the one-week revision period
options.D: It is optional for students graduating in summer

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告说格式审查与委员会对内容的批准是两回事，而内容批准必须事先取得，由此可推断它要在格式审查之前完成。A错误（over_inference）：公告说两者相互独立，内容批准不会因格式审查而自动获得。C错误（wrong_detail）：那一周是用来按格式审查意见修改重交的，不是用来获取内容批准的。D错误（unrelated_inference）：公告没有说暑期毕业生可免去内容批准，属无依据推断。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Starting next Monday, the campus shuttle will follow a new route because of construction near the Engineering Building. The shuttle will no longer stop at the West Quad station for the next three weeks. Instead, riders heading to that area should get off at the Library stop and walk five minutes north. Buses will continue to run every fifteen minutes during regular hours. We're sorry for any inconvenience, and the updated route map is now posted at every shuttle stop and on the transportation page of the university website.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain a temporary change to the shuttle route
options.B: To announce that shuttle service is ending
options.C: To recruit drivers for the campus shuttle
options.D: To describe a new Engineering Building

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知的核心是因施工导致班车路线临时调整，明确说明改道、停靠点变化和持续时间。B错误（reversed_intent）：班车并未停运，仍每十五分钟一班，只是改道。C错误（wrong_purpose）：通知完全没有提到招募司机。D错误（too_narrow/wrong_purpose）：施工的工程楼只是改道的原因，通知不是在介绍这栋楼。

questions.stem: What should riders heading to the West Quad area do?

options.A: Wait at the West Quad station as usual
options.B: Take a taxi to the Engineering Building
options.C: Get off at the Library stop and walk north
options.D: Use the shuttle only during evening hours

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知明确指出前往该区域的乘客应在图书馆站下车，然后向北步行五分钟。A错误（wrong_detail，与原文相反）：West Quad站在三周内停用，不能照常等车。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知从未提及打车。D错误（misattributed_detail）：班车在常规时间正常每十五分钟运行，并非只在晚间运营。

items.situation: student research poster session open to all majors
items.announcement: Good afternoon, everyone. As president of the Undergraduate Scholars Society, I'm excited to invite you to our spring research poster session this Thursday in the Hartman Student Center. What makes this event special is that it's open to students from every major, not just the sciences. If you've worked on any project this year, you're welcome to present it. Posters will be displayed from 1 p.m. to 4 p.m., and light refreshments will be served. To reserve a display board, just email the society by Tuesday evening. We hope to see your work on the wall this Thursday.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain how poster sessions are judged
options.B: To invite students of all majors to a poster session
options.C: To announce the winners of a research contest
options.D: To recruit new members for the society

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知的核心是邀请所有专业的本科生参加春季研究海报展示，并强调活动对每个专业开放。A错误（wrong_purpose）：通知没有解释评判标准，这甚至不是一个竞赛。C错误（wrong_purpose）：没有宣布任何获奖者。D错误（too_narrow/wrong_purpose）：虽然由学会主办，但目的不是招募会员，而是邀请大家来展示作品。

questions.stem: What must students do to get a display board?

options.A: Pay a small registration fee online
options.B: Submit a completed research paper first
options.C: Sign up at the Hartman Student Center desk
options.D: Email the society by Tuesday evening

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通知明确说明要预订展板，只需在周二晚上之前给学会发邮件。A错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知没有提到任何费用。B错误（wrong_detail，与原文相反）：通知说做过任何项目都可参加，并未要求先提交完整论文。C错误（misattributed_detail）：Hartman学生中心是活动举办地点，而非报名地点；报名方式是发邮件。

items.situation: health insurance enrollment information session
items.announcement: Good morning, students. This is a reminder that our annual health insurance information session will be held this Wednesday at 3 p.m. in Room 210 of the Student Services Building. During the session, an advisor will walk you through the enrollment steps and answer questions about coverage options. Please remember that all students are automatically enrolled in the university plan unless you submit a waiver showing you already have comparable coverage. The waiver form must be uploaded through the student portal by September 30th. If you miss that deadline, the plan's cost will be added to your tuition bill automatically.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a change in the university health plan
options.B: To explain why insurance costs have increased
options.C: To inform students about an insurance information session
options.D: To require all students to visit the health clinic

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知的核心是提醒学生参加年度健康保险信息说明会，并附带说明自动参保和豁免的相关事项。A错误（wrong_purpose）：通知没有宣布保险计划有任何变更。B错误（wrong_purpose）：通知从未提及费用上涨或解释原因。D错误（over_reach/wrong_purpose）：通知谈的是说明会和保险参保，并未要求所有学生去健康诊所。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about a student who already has comparable coverage?

options.A: They should submit a waiver before the deadline
options.B: They will be charged twice for insurance
options.C: They are not allowed to attend the session
options.D: They must cancel their outside insurance plan

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知说明学生会被自动参保，除非提交豁免表证明已有同等保险，且表格须在9月30日前上传，因此已有同等保险的学生应在截止日期前提交豁免。B错误（over_inference）：恰恰相反，提交豁免正是为了避免被收费。C错误（unrelated_inference）：说明会对所有学生开放，没有任何限制。D错误（over_inference）：通知只要求出示已有同等保险的证明，从未要求取消校外保险。

items.situation: community garden spring cleanup volunteer event
items.announcement: Hello, everyone. As the coordinator of the Green Campus program, I'd like to invite you to our spring cleanup of the community garden this Saturday. We'll be removing winter weeds and preparing the soil for planting, starting at 10 a.m. behind Foster Hall. Gloves and tools will be provided, but please wear closed-toe shoes and clothing you don't mind getting muddy. No gardening experience is needed, and you can stay for as long or as little as you like. To help us plan snacks, please add your name to the sign-up sheet outside the program office by Friday afternoon.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain new rules for using the garden
options.B: To announce that the garden is closing
options.C: To advertise a gardening course for credit
options.D: To invite volunteers to a garden cleanup

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通知的核心是邀请大家参加本周六的社区花园春季清理志愿活动。A错误（wrong_purpose）：通知没有解释使用花园的新规定。B错误（reversed_intent）：花园不是要关闭，而是要清理并为种植做准备。C错误（wrong_purpose）：这不是一门可获学分的课程，而是一次志愿活动。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker ask people to sign up by Friday?

options.A: Because space in the garden is very limited
options.B: So the program can prepare enough snacks
options.C: Because only experienced gardeners may join
options.D: So volunteers can be assigned to teams

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知明确说明请大家周五下午前报名是为了帮助他们安排零食，因此可推断报名是为了准备足够的零食。A错误（over_inference）：通知没有提到名额有限，反而说想待多久都行。C错误（unrelated_inference，与原文相反）：通知说不需要园艺经验。D错误（over_inference）：通知从未提到把志愿者分组。

items.situation: LinkedIn profile photo day at career center
items.announcement: Hi, everyone. The Career Center is excited to host a free LinkedIn Photo Day this Friday from 11 a.m. to 3 p.m. in the lobby of Bishop Hall. A professional photographer will be on site to take headshots you can use on your LinkedIn profile or job applications. We recommend dressing in business attire, since the photos are meant to look professional. There's no cost, but spots are limited, so please reserve a time slot through the Career Center website in advance. Your edited photo will be emailed to you within one week of the event.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To promote a free professional headshot event
options.B: To explain how to build a LinkedIn profile
options.C: To announce a new dress code on campus
options.D: To advertise a paid photography workshop

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知的核心是宣传职业中心举办的免费LinkedIn拍照日，由专业摄影师为学生拍摄职业头像。B错误（wrong_purpose）：通知是关于拍照活动，而非教如何搭建LinkedIn主页。C错误（wrong_purpose）：建议穿正装只是针对这次拍照，并非全校新着装规定。D错误（wrong_detail/wrong_purpose）：活动是免费的，也不是一个收费的摄影工作坊。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker recommend wearing business attire?

options.A: Because casual clothing is banned in Bishop Hall
options.B: Because the photographer charges less for it
options.C: So the photos look suitable for professional use
options.D: Because the event is a formal awards ceremony

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知说明建议穿正装是因为这些照片要显得专业，因此可推断穿正装是为了让照片适合用于求职等正式用途。A错误（over_inference）：通知没有说Bishop Hall禁止休闲着装，只是给出穿衣建议。B错误（unrelated_inference）：活动完全免费，摄影师不存在收费高低之说。D错误（over_inference）：这是拍照活动，并非正式颁奖典礼。

items.situation: student lounge furniture upgrade and temporary relocation
items.announcement: Attention students. The second-floor student lounge in the Union Building will be closed next week so that the old furniture can be replaced with new seating and study tables. The work is scheduled to begin Monday morning and should be finished by Friday afternoon. While the lounge is closed, students are welcome to use the temporary study space set up in Room 105 on the first floor. Please note that the vending machines on the second floor will remain accessible throughout the week. We appreciate your patience and think you'll really enjoy the upgraded space when it reopens.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform students of a temporary lounge closure for upgrades
options.B: To announce that the Union Building is closing permanently
options.C: To ask students to donate old furniture
options.D: To explain new rules for using the study tables

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知的核心是告知学生二楼休息室将临时关闭以更换新家具，并提供临时学习空间。B错误（reversed_intent）：关闭的只是二楼休息室且是临时的，整栋Union大楼并未永久关闭。C错误（wrong_purpose）：通知是替换旧家具，并未请学生捐赠家具。D错误（wrong_purpose）：通知没有解释使用学习桌的新规定。

questions.stem: Where can students study while the lounge is closed?

options.A: At the vending machine area on the second floor
options.B: In the library's upper-floor reading room
options.C: In a temporary space in Room 105 on the first floor
options.D: In the Union Building basement

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知明确说明休息室关闭期间，学生可使用一楼105房间设置的临时学习空间。A错误（misattributed_detail）：二楼自动售货机只是保持可用，并非学习空间。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知从未提到图书馆阅览室。D错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知没有提及任何地下室空间。

items.situation: study abroad program application info session
items.announcement: Good morning, students. The Office of International Programs will hold an information session about next year's study abroad opportunities this Tuesday at 4 p.m. in Carver Hall, Room 120. An advisor will explain the partner universities available, the application timeline, and how credits transfer back to your degree. Please be aware that to apply, you'll need at least one full year of study completed by the time you go abroad. Applications open the following Monday and close on November 15th. If you can't attend in person, a recording will be posted on the international programs page later that week.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the cancellation of study abroad programs
options.B: To inform students about a study abroad information session
options.C: To list the courses offered at partner universities
options.D: To remind students to renew their passports

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知的核心是告知学生关于明年留学项目的信息说明会，并介绍合作院校、申请时间线和学分转换。A错误（reversed_intent）：项目不是被取消，而是正在介绍和开放申请。C错误（too_narrow）：合作院校只是说明会的一部分内容，且通知没有列出具体课程。D错误（wrong_purpose）：通知从未提到护照或续签事宜。

questions.stem: What is required in order to apply for study abroad?

options.A: Having completed at least one year of study
options.B: Submitting two letters of recommendation
options.C: Attending the information session in person
options.D: Paying a deposit by November 15th

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知明确说明申请的前提是出国时至少已完成一整年的学业。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知从未提到推荐信。C错误（wrong_detail，与原文相反）：通知说不能到场可看录像，因此现场出席并非申请条件。D错误（misattributed_detail）：11月15日是申请截止日期，而非缴纳押金的要求。

items.situation: new bike registration requirement on campus
items.announcement: Attention students and staff. Beginning this fall, all bicycles parked on campus must be registered with Campus Safety. This new policy is meant to help us return lost or stolen bikes to their owners more quickly. Registration is completely free and takes only a few minutes at the Campus Safety office in Lowell Hall. Once registered, you'll receive a small sticker to attach to your bike frame. Please note that unregistered bicycles found after October 1st may be tagged with a warning. To register, bring your bike and student ID to the office any weekday between 9 a.m. and 5 p.m.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a new bike registration requirement
options.B: To warn that bike parking is no longer allowed
options.C: To advertise bicycles for sale on campus
options.D: To explain how to repair a damaged bike

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知的核心是宣布从今秋起所有校内停放的自行车必须在校园安全办公室登记的新政策。B错误（reversed_intent）：自行车停放并未被禁止，只是需要登记。C错误（wrong_purpose）：通知不是在出售自行车。D错误（wrong_purpose）：通知没有涉及如何修理自行车。

questions.stem: What should students bring in order to register a bike?

options.A: A receipt showing the bike's purchase price
options.B: A registration fee paid in cash
options.C: Their bike and student ID to the office
options.D: A completed form mailed in advance

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知明确说明登记时要把自行车和学生证带到办公室。A错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知从未提到购买收据或价格。B错误（wrong_detail，与原文相反）：登记是完全免费的，无需缴费。D错误（misattributed_detail）：登记是本人带车到现场办理，并非邮寄表格。

items.situation: guest author reading and book signing in the library
items.announcement: Good evening, everyone. The English Department is delighted to announce that award-winning novelist Clara Mendez will visit campus next Thursday for a public reading and book signing. The event will take place at 6 p.m. in the main reading room of Whitman Library. Ms. Mendez will read from her latest novel and then take questions from the audience. Copies of her books will be available for purchase at the door, and she'll happily sign them afterward. Admission is free and open to the public, so feel free to bring friends and family. We hope to see a great turnout next Thursday evening.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A creative writing course taught by a novelist
options.B: A visiting author's public reading and book signing
options.C: A sale of used books at the campus library
options.D: A change in the library's evening hours

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通知的核心是宣布获奖小说家Clara Mendez将到校举办公开朗读和签售活动。A错误（wrong_purpose）：这是一次朗读签售活动，而非一门写作课程。C错误（wrong_detail）：现场出售的是作者本人的新书，并非二手书义卖。D错误（wrong_purpose）：通知没有提到图书馆开放时间的变化。

questions.stem: What is true about attending the event?

options.A: Tickets must be reserved in advance
options.B: Only English majors may attend
options.C: Admission is free and open to the public
options.D: Attendees must buy a book to enter

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知明确说明活动免费且向公众开放，欢迎带亲友参加。A错误（related_but_not_stated）：通知没有提到需要提前预订门票。B错误（wrong_detail，与原文相反）：活动对公众开放，并不限于英语专业学生。D错误（wrong_detail）：可以在门口购书，但购书并非入场条件。

items.situation: scholarship application deadline reminder from financial aid
items.announcement: This is a reminder from the Financial Aid Office about the Merit Scholarship, whose application closes this Friday at 11:59 p.m. To be considered, you must submit both the online application form and one letter of recommendation through the financial aid portal. We've noticed that some students forget the recommendation letter, so please confirm yours has been uploaded before the deadline. Awards are based on academic performance rather than financial need, so all eligible students are encouraged to apply. Decisions will be announced by email in early December. If you have questions, our office in Hale Hall is open until 5 p.m. on weekdays.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain how scholarship money can be spent
options.B: To announce the winners of the Merit Scholarship
options.C: To remind students of a scholarship application deadline
options.D: To introduce a new financial aid office location

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通知的核心是提醒学生Merit奖学金的申请将在本周五截止，并强调要提交申请表和推荐信。A错误（wrong_purpose）：通知没有解释奖学金资金如何使用。B错误（wrong_purpose）：获奖结果要到12月初才公布，此处并未宣布获奖者。D错误（wrong_purpose）：Hale Hall只是答疑办公地点，通知并非介绍新的办公地址。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who do not demonstrate financial need?

options.A: They are still eligible to apply for the scholarship
options.B: They will automatically receive the award
options.C: They must submit two recommendation letters
options.D: They should apply at the Hale Hall office in person

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通知说明奖学金基于学业表现而非经济需求，鼓励所有符合条件的学生申请，因此可推断没有经济需求的学生同样有资格申请。B错误（over_inference）：有资格申请不等于会自动获奖，结果要经评选。C错误（wrong_detail）：只需一封推荐信，而非两封。D错误（over_inference）：Hale Hall只是答疑地点，申请是通过在线门户提交的。

items.situation: new student orientation schedule and requirements
items.announcement: Good morning, incoming students. Welcome to fall orientation week. Your mandatory orientation session begins this Thursday at 9 a.m. in Harper Hall, and it should wrap up by early afternoon. During the session, you'll meet your academic advisor, tour the main campus, and learn how to register for spring classes. Please remember to bring your student ID card, since you won't be able to check in without it. We'll provide a light breakfast and all the materials you'll need, so there's nothing else to prepare. If you have a scheduling conflict, contact the orientation office before Wednesday to arrange a makeup session.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain the orientation schedule and what to bring
options.B: To describe how to register for spring classes
options.C: To recruit student volunteers for campus tours
options.D: To announce a change in advisor assignments

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告整体在介绍新生迎新会的时间、地点、内容以及需要携带的物品，属于对日程和要求的总体说明。B错误（too_narrow）：登记春季课程只是迎新会的一个环节，不是整篇的目的。C错误（wrong_purpose）：公告从未招募志愿者，校园参观是新生体验的一部分而非招募。D错误（wrong_purpose）：公告提到会见导师，但并未宣布任何导师分配的变更。

questions.stem: What are students required to bring to the session?

options.A: A printed copy of their class schedule
options.B: Their own breakfast and snacks
options.C: Their student ID card
options.D: A list of questions for their advisor

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告明确说"Please remember to bring your student ID card, since you won't be able to check in without it"，学生证是唯一要求携带的物品。A错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告说会教学生如何登记春季课程，但没有要求携带课表。B错误（wrong_detail）：公告说会提供清淡早餐，与自带早餐恰好相反。D错误（related_but_not_stated）：会见导师确有提及，但并未要求准备问题清单。

items.situation: honors thesis oral defense schedule announcement
items.announcement: Attention honors students in the History Department. The schedule for this semester's honors thesis oral defenses has now been posted outside the department office in Cromwell Hall. Defenses will take place over three days, from next Tuesday through Thursday, in seminar room 210. Each student is allotted a forty-five minute slot, which includes both your presentation and questions from the committee. Please arrive at least fifteen minutes early to set up any slides or handouts you plan to use. We strongly encourage you to invite fellow students to attend, as a supportive audience often makes the experience far less nerve-racking. A reception with refreshments will follow on Thursday afternoon to celebrate everyone's hard work.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain how honors theses will be graded
options.B: To inform students of the thesis defense schedule and arrangements
options.C: To recruit committee members for the defenses
options.D: To remind students to submit their final thesis drafts

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告核心是通知荣誉论文口头答辩的日程安排（时间、地点、时长）以及相关注意事项，属于日程与安排的告知。A错误（wrong_purpose）：公告完全没有提到评分标准。C错误（wrong_purpose）：委员会被提及会提问，但公告并非招募委员。D错误（wrong_purpose）：公告谈的是答辩，而非提交论文终稿的提醒。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker encourage students to invite an audience?

options.A: Because the committee scores larger audiences higher
options.B: Because attendance is required for graduation credit
options.C: Because seminar room 210 must be filled to capacity
options.D: Because peer support can ease presenters' nervousness

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告说"a supportive audience often makes the experience far less nerve-racking"，可推断邀请观众是为了通过同伴支持缓解答辩者的紧张。A错误（over_inference）：公告从未说委员会会因观众多而打高分，属过度推断。B错误（unrelated_inference）：没有任何证据表明出席是毕业学分要求。C错误（over_inference）：公告未提及需把房间坐满，纯属臆测。

items.situation: career fair preparation workshop with resume review
items.announcement: Hello, students. With the fall career fair just two weeks away, the Career Center is hosting a preparation workshop this Monday at 4 p.m. in the Brandt Center, room 105. We'll walk you through how to research employers, practice your introduction, and dress for success. The second half of the workshop is devoted to one-on-one resume reviews with our advisors, so please bring a printed copy of your current resume. There's no need to register in advance; just show up and sign in at the door. Seating is limited, though, so we recommend arriving a few minutes early to claim a spot.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the date of the fall career fair
options.B: To explain a new dress code for campus interviews
options.C: To invite students to a career fair preparation workshop
options.D: To collect resumes for employers at the fair

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告整体在邀请学生参加招聘会准备工作坊，并说明内容、时间和地点。A错误（too_narrow）：招聘会的时间只是背景信息，公告的重点是工作坊本身。B错误（wrong_purpose）："dress for success"只是工作坊的一个环节，并非宣布新的着装规定。D错误（wrong_purpose）：简历是用于现场点评，不是为雇主收集。

questions.stem: What are students asked to bring to the workshop?

options.A: A printed copy of their resume
options.B: A completed registration form
options.C: A list of target employers
options.D: Professional interview attire

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告明确要求"please bring a printed copy of your current resume"用于一对一简历点评。B错误（wrong_detail）：公告说无需提前注册，直接到场签到即可，与带注册表相反。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：工作坊会教如何研究雇主，但没有要求带雇主清单。D错误（related_but_not_stated）："dress for success"是讲解话题，并未要求当天穿着面试正装。

items.situation: grand reopening of renovated gallery or performance hall
items.announcement: I'm delighted to announce that, after nearly a year of renovations, the Whitfield Art Gallery will hold its grand reopening this Saturday at noon. The newly expanded space features an additional exhibition wing and improved lighting throughout. Our opening exhibit showcases student artwork from across all four undergraduate years, and admission is completely free for the entire weekend. While the gallery is open to everyone, the first one hundred visitors on Saturday will receive a limited-edition commemorative print. Light refreshments will be served in the main lobby. We hope you'll join us to celebrate this exciting new chapter for the arts on campus.

questions.stem: What is featured in the gallery's opening exhibit?

options.A: Works on loan from a partner museum
options.B: Pieces created by visiting faculty artists
options.C: A retrospective of the gallery's history
options.D: Student artwork from all four undergraduate years

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。公告明确说开幕展"showcases student artwork from across all four undergraduate years"。A错误（related_but_not_stated）：从未提及向合作博物馆借展。B错误（wrong_detail）：作品出自学生而非到访的教师艺术家。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告说这是新篇章的庆祝，并非回顾画廊历史的展览。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the commemorative print?

options.A: It must be purchased at the lobby desk
options.B: It is available only while supplies last
options.C: It will be mailed to all weekend visitors
options.D: It is reserved for art majors only

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告说只有周六前一百名访客才能获得限量纪念版画，可推断它数量有限、先到先得，售完即止。A错误（over_inference）：公告说"receive"，是赠送而非购买。C错误（over_inference）：只发给前一百名访客，而非邮寄给所有周末访客。D错误（wrong_detail）：公告强调画廊对所有人开放，并未限定艺术专业学生。

items.situation: professional wardrobe pop-up and free headshot clinic
items.announcement: Attention students preparing for internships and interviews. Next Wednesday, the Career Center is hosting a one-day professional wardrobe pop-up alongside a free headshot clinic in the Student Union ballroom, from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. At the pop-up, you can borrow gently used business attire at no cost, keeping it for up to two weeks. Once you're dressed, a volunteer photographer will take a polished headshot you can use on your professional profiles. We do ask that you reserve a headshot time slot in advance through the Career Center portal, as walk-in photo appointments cannot be guaranteed. The clothing racks, however, are open to everyone throughout the day.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To promote a wardrobe pop-up and free headshot clinic
options.B: To raise donations of used business clothing
options.C: To announce a new dress code for internships
options.D: To hire student photographers for the Career Center

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告整体在宣传一个为期一天的职业装借用快闪活动和免费形象照诊所，并说明如何参与。B错误（wrong_purpose）：活动是借出衣物，而非募集捐赠的旧衣。C错误（wrong_purpose）：公告从未规定实习着装要求。D错误（wrong_purpose）：摄影师是志愿者协助拍照，公告并非招聘学生摄影师。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about getting a headshot at the event?

options.A: It costs a small fee paid at the door
options.B: It is available only to graduating seniors
options.C: Students without a reservation may not get one
options.D: Photos are emailed within three business days

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。公告说需提前在门户网站预约时段，因为"walk-in photo appointments cannot be guaranteed"，可推断没有预约的学生可能无法拍到形象照。A错误（wrong_detail）：公告明确说形象照诊所是免费的。B错误（over_inference）：面向准备实习和面试的学生，并未限定应届毕业生。D错误（over_inference）：公告完全没有提及照片的交付方式或时限，属臆测。

items.situation: main library temporarily relocating to an annex during HVAC repairs
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Due to emergency repairs to the heating and cooling system, the main library building will be closed beginning this Monday and is expected to reopen in three weeks. During the closure, core library services will operate out of the Foster Annex, just east of the quad. Reference librarians, study rooms, and computer stations will all be available there, though seating will be more limited than usual. Books on the upper floors of the main building cannot be retrieved during this period, so please request any titles you'll need through the online catalog by this Friday. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform the campus of a temporary library closure and relocation
options.B: To announce the permanent closing of the main library
options.C: To promote the new study rooms in the Foster Annex
options.D: To explain a change in library borrowing limits

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告核心是告知主图书馆因维修临时关闭，并将核心服务迁至Foster Annex。B错误（reversed_intent）：图书馆只是临时关闭三周，并非永久关闭，与原意相反。C错误（too_narrow）：自习室只是迁移后可用的服务之一，不是整篇的目的。D错误（wrong_purpose）：公告未涉及借书数量限制的变化。

questions.stem: What must patrons do to access books from the upper floors?

options.A: Request the titles online by Friday
options.B: Visit the main building during limited hours
options.C: Email a reference librarian at the annex
options.D: Wait until the building reopens in three weeks

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告说上层楼的图书在此期间无法取阅，因此"please request any titles you'll need through the online catalog by this Friday"。B错误（wrong_detail）：主楼是关闭的，无法进入，所谓限时开放与原文矛盾。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：参考馆员确实在Annex，但公告要求的是通过在线目录预约图书，而非发邮件。D错误（misattributed_detail）：三周是重新开放的预期时间，但公告给出的解决办法是周五前在线预约，而非干等。

items.situation: shuttle bus schedule changing to reduced winter break hours
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the campus shuttle will switch to its reduced winter break schedule starting next Monday, December 18th. During the break, shuttles will run only once an hour, from 8 a.m. to 6 p.m., rather than every fifteen minutes. The downtown route will be suspended entirely until classes resume in January. Riders should note that the updated timetable is posted at every shuttle stop and on the transportation page of the university website. If you rely on the shuttle to reach the train station, please plan extra travel time accordingly. Regular service will resume on the first day of spring semester.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a reduced shuttle schedule over winter break
options.B: To introduce a new downtown shuttle route
options.C: To explain why the shuttle service is being canceled
options.D: To remind riders to purchase shuttle passes

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告核心是提醒校园班车将在寒假期间改为缩减的运营时刻表。B错误（reversed_intent）：市区线路是被暂停，而非新增，与原意相反。C错误（wrong_purpose）：班车只是减少班次，并未取消整个服务。D错误（wrong_purpose）：公告完全没有提到购买班车票的事。

questions.stem: How often will shuttles run during winter break?

options.A: Every fifteen minutes
options.B: Once every hour
options.C: Only on weekends
options.D: Twice each morning

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告明确说寒假期间班车"will run only once an hour, from 8 a.m. to 6 p.m."。A错误（wrong_detail）：每十五分钟一班是平时的班次，而非寒假的班次。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告未提及只在周末运行。D错误（wrong_detail）：公告说从早八点到晚六点每小时一班，而非每早两班。

items.situation: new printing quota and pay-per-page policy in computer labs
items.announcement: Attention all students. Beginning next semester, the campus computer labs will introduce a new printing policy. Each student will receive a free printing allowance of five hundred pages per semester, which should cover typical coursework needs. Once you exceed that limit, additional pages will be charged at five cents each, billed automatically to your student account. To help you keep track, your remaining balance will appear on the screen each time you send a job to the printer. We're making this change to reduce paper waste, which has risen sharply in recent years. Double-sided printing is strongly encouraged and counts as a single page toward your quota.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a new printing quota and charges in the labs
options.B: To report that the computer labs will close for upgrades
options.C: To encourage students to use personal printers instead
options.D: To announce that printing will become entirely free

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告核心是宣布机房新的打印配额政策以及超额后的收费方式。B错误（wrong_purpose）：公告未提及机房关闭升级。C错误（wrong_purpose）：公告没有建议学生改用个人打印机。D错误（reversed_intent）：超过免费额度后要按页收费，并非完全免费，与原意相反。

questions.stem: What happens once a student exceeds the free page allowance?

options.A: Additional pages cost five cents each
options.B: Printing is disabled until next semester
options.C: The student must request a quota increase
options.D: Color printing is no longer permitted

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告明确说超过额度后"additional pages will be charged at five cents each"。B错误（over_inference）：超额后仍可继续打印，只是收费，并非被禁用。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告未提及需要申请提高配额。D错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告没有涉及彩印的任何限制。

items.situation: annual winter charity fundraiser and donation drive
items.announcement: Hello, everyone. The Student Volunteer Association is excited to host our annual Winter Warmth Drive next week to support local families in need. From Monday through Friday, we'll be collecting new or gently used coats, blankets, and canned food in the lobby of the Student Center. On Friday evening at 7 p.m., we'll wrap up the week with a charity concert in Hale Auditorium, featuring several student bands. Admission to the concert is one canned good per person. All donations stay right here in our community, going directly to the downtown shelter. Come show your support and help us make this winter a little warmer for our neighbors.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To invite students to a winter charity drive and concert
options.B: To recruit new members for the Volunteer Association
options.C: To announce a change in Student Center lobby hours
options.D: To raise money for a new auditorium sound system

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告整体在邀请大家参与冬季慈善募捐周以及周五的慈善音乐会。B错误（wrong_purpose）：公告未招募协会新成员。C错误（too_narrow）：大堂只是收集捐赠的地点，公告并非宣布大堂开放时间变更。D错误（wrong_purpose）：募集所得是给社区收容所，而非购买礼堂音响。

questions.stem: What is required to attend the Friday concert?

options.A: A canned good donated at the door
options.B: A ticket purchased in advance
options.C: A valid student ID card
options.D: A signed volunteer sign-up sheet

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告明确说"Admission to the concert is one canned good per person"，即每人一份罐头食品作为入场凭证。B错误（wrong_detail）：入场凭的是罐头食品，而非提前购票。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：公告未要求出示学生证。D错误（related_but_not_stated）：这是志愿者协会主办，但并未要求签署志愿者报名表才能入场。

items.situation: course registration deadline and add/drop period reminder
items.announcement: I want to remind everyone that the deadline to register for spring courses is this Friday at 11:59 p.m. After that, late registration will reopen in January, but a fifty-dollar late fee will apply. Keep in mind that classes filling popular requirements tend to reach capacity quickly, so I'd encourage you to finalize your schedule sooner rather than later. The add/drop period runs through the first two weeks of the semester, giving you time to adjust your courses without penalty. If a class you need is already full, be sure to join the waitlist, since spots often open up during add/drop. Reach out to your advisor if you run into any trouble.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To remind students of the registration deadline and related policies
options.B: To announce that several spring courses have been canceled
options.C: To introduce a brand-new online registration system
options.D: To explain how final grades will be calculated

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。公告核心是提醒春季选课截止日期以及相关的迟注册费、加退课等政策。B错误（wrong_purpose）：公告说热门课会很快满员，但并未宣布课程被取消。C错误（wrong_purpose）：公告未提及任何新的在线选课系统。D错误（wrong_purpose）：公告与期末成绩计算无关。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker advise students to join a waitlist?

options.A: Because waitlisted students receive a tuition discount
options.B: Because openings often appear during add/drop
options.C: Because waitlists guarantee a spot in any class
options.D: Because the add/drop period has been canceled

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。公告说"join the waitlist, since spots often open up during add/drop"，可推断建议候补是因为加退课期间常有名额空出。A错误（unrelated_inference）：没有任何证据表明候补学生能享学费折扣。C错误（over_inference）：公告只说常有名额空出，并未保证一定有位，属过度推断。D错误（wrong_detail）：公告明确说加退课期持续前两周，并未取消。

items.situation: campus tree-planting and trail restoration day
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. I'm excited to announce that the Campus Green Initiative is hosting its first Trail Restoration Day this Saturday, beginning at 8 a.m. at the trailhead behind Holloway Residence Hall. We'll be planting native saplings and rebuilding the eroded sections of the north loop, so volunteers should expect physically demanding work in uneven terrain. We'll provide shovels, gloves, and a catered lunch, but you'll want to bring a refillable water bottle and dress for the weather. Because the grant funding this project requires us to document community participation, everyone must sign in at the registration tent before starting. Spots are limited, so reserve yours through the Initiative's online portal by Thursday evening.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To recruit volunteers for a trail restoration project
options.B: To explain why the north loop trail was closed
options.C: To announce a new outdoor recreation course
options.D: To discourage hiking on the eroded north loop

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通告的核心是邀请志愿者参加周六的步道修复日，植树和重建被侵蚀的路段——这正是组织者的主要目的。B错误（wrong_purpose）：通告从未说步道因何关闭，只说要修复被侵蚀的路段，这不是通告目的。C错误（wrong_purpose）：完全没有提到任何课程，这是一个志愿活动而非学术课程。D错误（reversed_intent）：通告是号召大家来参与修复，而非劝阻人们使用步道，意思正好相反。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the requirement to sign in at the registration tent?

options.A: It is intended to prevent overcrowding on the trail
options.B: It allows volunteers to collect their free lunch
options.C: It helps the organizers meet a grant's reporting condition
options.D: It is required by campus safety regulations

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通告明确说"资助该项目的拨款要求我们记录社区参与情况，因此每个人必须在登记帐篷签到"，可推断签到是为了满足拨款方对参与人数报告的要求。A错误（over_inference）：限制名额（spots are limited）确实存在，但签到的原因被明确归于拨款记录，把签到说成防止步道拥挤是过度推断。B错误（wrong_detail）：午餐是提供的，但签到与领午餐无关，这是张冠李戴的细节。D错误（unrelated_inference）：通告完全没有提到校园安全规定，没有任何依据支持这一推断。

items.situation: campus bookstore moving to a new building
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Please be aware that the campus bookstore will be relocating from its current spot in the Student Union to the newly renovated ground floor of Carver Hall.
