The current location will close permanently after business hours this Friday, and the new store will open the following Monday at 9 a.m. During the move, all online orders will still be processed without interruption, so you can continue purchasing course materials through the bookstore's website. Please note that any textbook rentals due for return next week should now be dropped off at the temporary kiosk outside the library, not at the old store. We appreciate your patience during this transition.

questions.stem: When will the new bookstore location open?

options.A: After business hours this Friday
options.B: The Monday following the Friday closure
options.C: Immediately at the temporary library kiosk
options.D: As soon as online orders are processed

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通告说旧店本周五营业结束后永久关闭，新店"接下来的周一上午9点"开业，因此是周五关闭之后的那个周一。A错误（misattributed_detail）：本周五营业后是旧店关闭的时间，而非新店开业时间，张冠李戴。C错误（wrong_detail）：图书馆旁的临时服务台是用来归还教材租赁的，不是新书店开业地点。D错误（related_but_not_stated）：在线订单一直照常处理，但通告从未把开业时间与订单处理挂钩，这是文中未述的关联。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about purchasing course materials during the move?

options.A: It will be unavailable until the new store opens
options.B: It must be done in person at Carver Hall
options.C: It requires returning rentals to the old store first
options.D: It can continue without disruption through the website

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通告说搬迁期间所有在线订单照常处理，学生可继续通过书店网站购买课程材料，因此可推断购买不会中断。A错误（reversed_intent）：通告强调在线购买不中断，说"要等到新店开业才能买"与原意相反。B错误（wrong_detail）：Carver Hall是新店地址且周一才开，搬迁期间无法在那里当面购买。C错误（misattributed_detail）：归还租赁教材到临时服务台是另一件事，与购买课程材料无关，属张冠李戴。

items.situation: student research poster session open to all majors
items.announcement: Hi everyone, this is a reminder from the Student Research Society. We're hosting our spring poster session next Wednesday afternoon in the Whitman Hall atrium, and we'd love to see you there. This event showcases student projects from every department, so whether you study chemistry, history, or music, your work belongs here. Presenters will stand by their posters from 1 to 4 p.m. to discuss their research and answer questions from visitors. If you'd like to present, you must submit your poster title and a short summary through our online form by this Friday. Light refreshments will be served, and all students are welcome to attend, even if you're just curious.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: Judging criteria for a research competition
options.B: A change to the Whitman Hall atrium hours
options.C: An upcoming poster session open to all students
options.D: A new requirement for science majors to present

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通告主旨是宣传下周三举办、面向所有院系学生开放的春季海报展示会，并邀请大家参加或报名展示。A错误（wrong_purpose）：通告完全没有提到评审标准，这不是一场带评分的竞赛。B错误（too_narrow）：虽提到展示时间为下午1到4点，但这只是细节，通告并非在通知场馆开放时间的变更。D错误（reversed_intent）：通告说欢迎所有专业且自愿报名，而非要求理科生必须展示，意思相反。

questions.stem: What must students do if they want to present a poster?

options.A: Submit a title and summary through the online form
options.B: Reserve a table in the atrium by Wednesday
options.C: Be enrolled in a science department
options.D: Bring printed refreshments for visitors

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通告明确说想展示的人必须在本周五前通过在线表格提交海报标题和简短摘要。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通告未提及预订桌位，下周三是活动日而非报名截止日，属文中未述。C错误（wrong_detail）：活动面向所有院系学生，不要求是理科专业，与原文相反。D错误（misattributed_detail）：通告说主办方提供茶点，而非要求参展者自带，张冠李戴。

items.situation: senior capstone presentation schedule
items.announcement: Good afternoon, seniors. This is an important reminder about the schedule for your capstone presentations. All graduating students in the engineering program will present their final projects in Lambert Lecture Hall during the last week of April. Each presentation slot is twenty minutes long, including time for the faculty panel to ask questions. The full schedule listing your assigned day and time has been posted on the department's bulletin board and emailed to your university account. Please arrive at least fifteen minutes early and bring a backup copy of your slides on a USB drive. If you have a scheduling conflict, contact the department office before this Friday to request a change.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain how capstone projects will be graded
options.B: To recruit faculty members for a review panel
options.C: To announce a new graduation requirement
options.D: To inform seniors about the capstone presentation schedule

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通告的主要目的是告知毕业班学生关于毕业设计展示的安排——时间、地点、时长以及如何查看个人时段。A错误（wrong_purpose）：通告提到教师小组会提问，但完全没有说明如何评分，评分标准不是目的。B错误（wrong_purpose）：教师小组已经存在并将提问，通告并非在招募评审教师。C错误（wrong_purpose）：毕业设计展示是既有安排，通告通知的是日程，而非宣布一项新的毕业要求。

questions.stem: What are students advised to bring to their presentation?

options.A: A signed permission form from an advisor
options.B: A backup copy of their slides on a USB drive
options.C: Printed handouts for the faculty panel
options.D: A laptop borrowed from the department office

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通告明确建议学生提前至少十五分钟到场，并用U盘带一份幻灯片的备份。A错误（related_but_not_stated）：通告从未提到任何导师签字的许可表，属文中未述。C错误（related_but_not_stated）：通告没有要求为教师小组准备纸质讲义，这是合理但未提及的内容。D错误（misattributed_detail）：系办公室是用来联系调整日程的，通告没有说从那里借笔记本电脑，张冠李戴。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Attention all shuttle riders. Due to construction beginning on Maple Avenue next Monday, the campus shuttle will follow a modified route for approximately three weeks. During this period, the shuttle will no longer stop at the Maple Avenue station; instead, riders should board at the temporary stop in front of the Recreation Center. To make up for the longer walk, we'll be adding an extra shuttle to the line, so buses will arrive every eight minutes during peak hours. The updated route map and timetable are available on the transportation office website. We apologize for any inconvenience and thank you for your patience while these improvements are completed.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform riders of a temporary change to the shuttle route
options.B: To announce that shuttle service will be discontinued
options.C: To advertise a new recreation center opening
options.D: To explain how to purchase shuttle passes online

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通告主旨是告知乘客因Maple Avenue施工，校园班车将在约三周内改走临时路线并调整停靠站。B错误（reversed_intent）：通告说班车继续运营，还会增加一班车，而非停运，意思相反。C错误（wrong_purpose）：Recreation Center只是临时停靠点，通告并非在宣传它开业。D错误（wrong_purpose）：通告提到网站上有路线图和时刻表，但完全没有涉及购买班车票，这不是目的。

questions.stem: Where should riders board the shuttle during the construction period?

options.A: At the Maple Avenue station as usual
options.B: At any stop listed on the printed timetable
options.C: At the temporary stop in front of the Recreation Center
options.D: At the transportation office on Maple Avenue

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通告明确说施工期间班车不再停靠Maple Avenue站，乘客应在Recreation Center门前的临时停靠点上车。A错误（wrong_detail）：Maple Avenue站正是施工期间停用的站点，与原文相反。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：网站上有更新的时刻表，但通告并未说可在时刻表上的任意站点上车，属文中未述。D错误（misattributed_detail）：交通办公室只是查询路线图和时刻表的渠道，并非上车地点，且Maple Avenue正在施工，属张冠李戴。

items.situation: dining hall temporary closure for kitchen upgrade
items.announcement: Attention residents of the North Quad. We want to let you know that the Birchwood Dining Hall will be closed for a kitchen equipment upgrade from this Sunday through the following Wednesday. While Birchwood is closed, your meal plan will be fully honored at the Hillside Dining Hall, which will extend its dinner hours until 9 p.m. to handle the additional guests. We understand Hillside is a longer walk for many of you, so a complimentary shuttle will run between North Quad and Hillside every fifteen minutes during meal times. Birchwood is scheduled to reopen for breakfast that Thursday with its new equipment. Thank you for bearing with us during this short upgrade.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform residents of a temporary dining hall closure
options.B: To announce permanent changes to meal plan options
options.C: To advertise extended dinner hours as a new policy
options.D: To encourage students to eat at Hillside more often

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通告主旨是告知North Quad住宿生Birchwood餐厅将因厨房设备升级而临时关闭，并说明替代用餐安排。B错误（wrong_purpose）：餐饮计划在Hillside照常有效，通告并未宣布对餐饮计划做任何永久性更改。C错误（too_narrow）：延长晚餐到9点只是关闭期间的临时安排，并非一项新政策，且只是细节。D错误（reversed_intent）：通告是因Birchwood临时关闭才让大家暂去Hillside，而非长期鼓励大家更多去Hillside吃饭，意图相反。

questions.stem: How can residents get to the Hillside Dining Hall during the closure?

options.A: By taking a complimentary shuttle every fifteen minutes
options.B: By reserving a seat through the dining services website
options.C: By using a meal voucher issued at North Quad
options.D: By walking along the newly opened Maple Avenue path

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通告明确说关闭期间用餐时段会有一班免费班车每十五分钟往返North Quad和Hillside。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通告从未提到通过网站预订座位，属合理但未述的内容。C错误（wrong_detail）：通告说餐饮计划在Hillside照常有效，并未提到发放餐券，与原文不符。D错误（misattributed_detail）：通告没有提及任何"新开的Maple Avenue步道"，这是借用了无关地名的虚构细节，属张冠李戴。

items.situation: new quiet-hours policy in the main library
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the main library is introducing new quiet-hours guidelines beginning next Monday. In response to student requests during finals season, the entire third and fourth floors will become designated silent-study zones, where conversation and phone calls are no longer permitted. Group discussion and collaborative work should now take place on the first floor or in the bookable study rooms on the second floor. To help everyone adjust, library staff will hand out small reminder cards near the entrances during the first week. These guidelines will remain in effect through the end of the exam period. If you need a group room, reserve one in advance through the library's booking system.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce new quiet-hours rules for the library
options.B: To explain how to extend a study room reservation
options.C: To report a shortage of seating during finals
options.D: To discourage students from studying in groups

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通告主旨是宣布主图书馆从下周一起实行新的安静时段规定，将三、四楼设为静音自习区。B错误（too_narrow）：通告末尾提到可预订小组讨论室，但只是细节指引，并非关于如何延长预订。C错误（wrong_purpose）：通告提到是回应期末季的学生请求，但并未报告座位短缺问题，这不是目的。D错误（reversed_intent）：通告仍为小组讨论保留了一楼和二楼讨论室，是在划分区域而非劝阻小组学习，意图相反。

questions.stem: Where should students go for group discussion under the new guidelines?

options.A: To the first floor or the second-floor study rooms
options.B: To the silent-study zones on the upper floors
options.C: To the reminder card station near the entrance
options.D: To any open seat in the library after Monday

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通告明确说小组讨论和协作应在一楼或二楼可预订的自习室进行。B错误（wrong_detail）：三、四楼是禁止交谈的静音区，正是不能进行小组讨论的地方，与原文相反。C错误（misattributed_detail）：入口附近发放的是提醒卡片，那不是供讨论的场所，张冠李戴。D错误（over_inference）：通告对小组讨论的地点有明确规定，说"周一后随便找空位"超出了文中信息，属过度推断。

items.situation: guest lecture by a visiting economist
items.announcement: I'm pleased to announce that the Economics Department will be hosting a special guest lecture next Thursday evening. Dr. Elena Park, a leading researcher on global trade policy, will speak in Foster Auditorium at 6 p.m. on the future of international supply chains. The talk is free and open to all students, regardless of major, though seating is limited and will be available on a first-come, first-served basis. Following the lecture, there will be a thirty-minute question-and-answer session, so come prepared with your questions. Because we expect a large turnout, we recommend arriving by 5:30 to secure a seat. Copies of Dr. Park's recent book will also be available for purchase in the lobby.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To promote the sale of Dr. Park's recent book
options.B: To announce a guest lecture open to all students
options.C: To recruit economics majors for a research project
options.D: To explain changes to the Foster Auditorium schedule

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通告主旨是宣布经济系下周四晚举办、向所有学生开放的客座讲座。A错误（too_narrow）：大厅出售Dr. Park新书只是结尾提到的一个细节，绝非通告的主要目的。C错误（wrong_purpose）：讲座面向所有专业的学生，通告并非在为某个研究项目招募经济学专业的学生。D错误（wrong_purpose）：Foster Auditorium只是讲座地点，通告并未涉及该礼堂日程的任何变更。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker recommend arriving by 5:30?

options.A: Because tickets must be purchased before the talk
options.B: Because the question-and-answer session begins early
options.C: Because seating is limited and fills on a first-come basis
options.D: Because the lecture will start earlier than scheduled

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通告说座位有限、先到先得，且预计人多，因此建议5:30前到场以确保有座。A错误（wrong_detail）：讲座免费开放，无需购票，与原文相反；出售的是书，不是门票。B错误（misattributed_detail）：问答环节是在讲座之后进行的三十分钟，与建议提前到场的原因无关，张冠李戴。D错误（wrong_detail）：讲座时间是晚上6点，通告从未说会提前开始，这与原文不符。

items.situation: new lab safety certification requirement
items.announcement: Attention all chemistry students. Starting this semester, the department is implementing a new safety requirement for anyone using the research laboratories. Before you can be granted lab access, you must complete the online safety certification module and pass the accompanying quiz with a score of at least eighty percent. The module covers proper handling of chemicals, emergency procedures, and waste disposal, and it takes roughly two hours to finish. You must complete this certification by the end of the second week of classes; students who miss this deadline will have their lab swipe access temporarily suspended until they comply. The link to the module has been posted on the department portal under the announcements tab.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a new safety certification required for lab access
options.B: To describe recent renovations to the research laboratories
options.C: To remind students of an upcoming chemistry exam
options.D: To advertise an optional workshop on chemical safety

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通告主旨是宣布本学期起使用研究实验室必须先完成在线安全认证这一新要求。B错误（wrong_purpose）：通告完全没有提到实验室翻修，这不是内容。C错误（wrong_purpose）：通告提到认证模块附带一个测验，但那不是某门化学课程的考试，且重点是认证要求而非考试提醒。D错误（reversed_intent）：该认证是强制性的、缺席会被暂停实验室门禁，而非一个可选的研讨会，意思相反。

questions.stem: What happens to students who miss the certification deadline?

options.A: They must retake the quiz in person at the office
options.B: Their lab swipe access is temporarily suspended
options.C: They are removed from the chemistry program
options.D: They receive a failing grade on their coursework

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通告明确说错过截止期限的学生其实验室刷卡门禁会被临时暂停，直到完成认证为止。A错误（misattributed_detail）：测验是在线完成的，通告没有说要去办公室当面重考，张冠井戴。C错误（over_inference）：通告只说暂停门禁，远未到将学生开除出化学专业的程度，属过度推断。D错误（related_but_not_stated）：通告完全没有提到课程成绩或不及格，这是文中未述的合理猜测。

items.situation: international food festival on the main quad
items.announcement: Hello everyone, the International Students Association is thrilled to invite you to our annual Global Food Festival this Saturday on the Main Quad. From noon until 4 p.m., student groups from more than twenty countries will be serving traditional dishes from their home regions. Tickets are not required, but you'll need to purchase food tokens at the entrance booth, with all proceeds going toward our scholarship fund for international students. There will also be live music and cultural performances on the central stage throughout the afternoon. In case of rain, the festival will move indoors to the Student Union ballroom. We can't wait to share our cultures with you, so bring your friends and an empty stomach.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To request volunteers to cook traditional dishes
options.B: To announce a fundraising scholarship application
options.C: To invite students to an international food festival
options.D: To explain a new policy on campus food vendors

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通告主旨是邀请大家参加本周六在主广场举办的国际美食节，品尝各国传统菜肴并欣赏文化表演。A错误（wrong_purpose）：负责做菜的是来自各国的学生团体，通告并非在招募做菜志愿者。B错误（too_narrow）：购买餐券的收益用于国际学生奖学金基金，但这只是细节，通告不是在宣布奖学金申请。D错误（wrong_purpose）：通告完全没有涉及校园餐饮供应商的任何政策，这不是内容。

questions.stem: What will happen to the festival if it rains?

options.A: It will move indoors to the Student Union ballroom
options.B: It will be postponed to the following Saturday
options.C: It will continue under tents on the Main Quad
options.D: It will be cancelled and tokens refunded

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通告明确说如遇下雨，美食节将移至室内的Student Union宴会厅举行。B错误（related_but_not_stated）：通告说的是改到室内而非改期，延后到下周六属文中未述。C错误（wrong_detail）：下雨时是转移到室内，而非在主广场搭帐篷继续，与原文相反。D错误（over_inference）：通告给出的应对是移至室内，并未提到取消或退还餐券，属过度推断。

items.situation: undergraduate research symposium abstract submission deadline
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. As department head, I want to remind all juniors and seniors about the Undergraduate Research Symposium this October. Abstracts of no more than 250 words are due to the symposium portal by 11:59 PM on Friday, September 13. Late submissions will not be reviewed. Please attach a one-page faculty endorsement letter; without it, your abstract will be returned. Travel funds are available for accepted presenters whose research involves off-campus fieldwork. If you are unsure whether your project qualifies, please email Dr. Kennedy in our office before the end of August.

questions.stem: What document must accompany each submitted abstract?

options.A: A signed travel-funds request form
options.B: A one-page faculty endorsement letter
options.C: A printed copy of the student's transcript
options.D: A research timeline covering the full semester

questions.explanation: 广播明确要求附一封一页的导师推荐信，否则摘要会被退回。B 正确。A 与广播将旅费视为后续福利相悖，topic_adjacent。C、D 没有提到，wrong_detail。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students whose research takes them off campus?

options.A: They will be excluded from the symposium for safety reasons
options.B: They must apply separately for travel insurance before submitting
options.C: They can only present posters and not give oral talks
options.D: They may be eligible for additional travel funding if their abstract is accepted

questions.explanation: 广播说被接收的、涉及校外田野工作的项目有旅费支持。D 正是合理推断。A 与广播鼓励参赛相反，reversed_intent。B 没提到保险，over_inference。C 没有区分海报和口头，wrong_detail。

items.situation: recreation center extending hours during finals week
items.announcement: Attention, students. The University Recreation Center will operate on extended hours during finals week, December 9 through December 15. The fitness floor and indoor track will be available from 5:00 AM until 1:00 AM the following morning. Group fitness classes, however, will run on a reduced schedule, with only morning yoga and evening cardio on offer. The climbing wall will close at 9:00 PM each evening for routine maintenance. Lockers will be cleared every night at midnight, so please remove your belongings before leaving the building. Regular hours resume Monday, December 16.

questions.stem: When will the climbing wall close during finals week?

options.A: At 5:00 AM each morning
options.B: At 1:00 PM each afternoon
options.C: At 9:00 PM each evening
options.D: At 1:00 AM the following morning

questions.explanation: 广播明说攀岩墙每晚 9 点关闭以做保养。C 正确。A、B、D 都是时间陷阱：5 AM 是健身楼层开放时间，1 AM 是健身楼层关闭时间，B 没出现。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who leave items in their lockers overnight?

options.A: Their belongings will be removed when the lockers are cleared at midnight
options.B: Their items will be safely stored for the entire finals week
options.C: Their lockers will be permanently reassigned to other members
options.D: Their access cards will be suspended until they retrieve their belongings

questions.explanation: 广播说储物柜每晚午夜清空，请离开前取走物品。A 是合理推断：留下的物品会被清空。B 与广播相反，reversed_intent。C 没有依据，over_inference。D 没出现，wrong_detail。

items.situation: annual outdoor movie night with blanket seating
items.announcement: Hi, everyone, this is Tara from the Student Activities Board. We're hosting our annual outdoor movie night next Friday, September 27, at Grover Field. The film will start at 8:30 PM, but please arrive by 8:00 to find a good spot. There is no chair seating; bring a blanket or a small ground mat. Free popcorn and lemonade will be served beside the projection booth. In case of rain, the event will move into Grover Hall, room 110, the following evening. We hope to see all of you under the stars.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of the announcement?

options.A: To remind students about safety rules for outdoor events on campus
options.B: To explain the Student Activities Board's budget for the year
options.C: To recruit volunteers for a new film studies club
options.D: To invite students to an outdoor movie night and explain seating and weather plans

questions.explanation: 广播主旨是邀请学生参加户外电影夜并说明座位和雨天安排。D 正确。A、B、C 都没出现，都是 wrong_topic 或 wrong_purpose。

questions.stem: What should students bring with them to the event?

options.A: A folding chair and an umbrella
options.B: A blanket or a small ground mat
options.C: A bottle of lemonade for themselves
options.D: A donation for the activities board

questions.explanation: 广播明说现场没有椅子，请自带毯子或小垫子。B 正确。A 与广播相反，reversed_intent。C、D 没提到，wrong_detail。

items.situation: industry professional speaking about career paths
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. Next Tuesday at 4:00 PM in Tisch Hall room 220, our department will host a guest lecture by Mei Lin, a senior product manager at the engineering firm Halverson Dynamics. Ms. Lin will speak about realistic career paths for computer-science majors, including positions that do not require advanced degrees. The talk will be followed by a thirty-minute open question session. Please email Camila in our office by Friday if you plan to attend; we need a head count for refreshments. A short writing sample is not required, but recent graduates are encouraged to bring a copy of their resume.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: An upcoming guest lecture on realistic career paths for computer-science majors
options.B: A required interview workshop for graduating seniors only
options.C: Changes to the graduate admission requirements at Halverson Dynamics
options.D: Funding opportunities for students who want to attend academic conferences

questions.explanation: 广播主旨是宣布关于计算机专业现实职业路径的客座讲座。A 正确。B、C、D 都没出现，都是 wrong_topic。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who plan to attend the talk?

options.A: They must wait outside the room until after Ms. Lin's introduction
options.B: They are required to submit a writing sample before the talk
options.C: They should email Camila by Friday so the office can plan refreshments
options.D: They will receive course credit for attending and asking questions

questions.explanation: 广播请有意参加的同学周五前发邮件给 Camila 以便统计茶点份数。C 正确。A 没提到，over_inference。B 与广播相反，reversed_intent。D 没出现，over_inference。

items.situation: interdisciplinary conference call for papers
items.announcement: Good afternoon, students. The Center for Interdisciplinary Studies is now accepting paper proposals for our spring symposium on Climate and Culture, scheduled for April 18 in Whitman Auditorium. We welcome submissions from any discipline, including arts, humanities, sciences, and policy. Abstracts should be 250 to 300 words and uploaded through the symposium portal by March 7 at 5:00 PM. Selected papers will receive a small travel stipend. Please note that proposals submitted by email will not be reviewed, so be sure to use the portal.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To remind students of an upcoming graduation rehearsal
options.B: To call for paper proposals for an interdisciplinary symposium
options.C: To explain a new requirement for graduate thesis submissions
options.D: To recruit volunteers for an arts and culture festival

questions.explanation: 公告核心是征集 symposium 论文提案，并说明提交方式和时限。其他选项与公告主题无关。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about proposals sent by email?

options.A: They will receive a delayed response from the committee.
options.B: They must be accompanied by an additional cover letter.
options.C: They will be forwarded to the symposium chair manually.
options.D: They will not be considered for the symposium.

questions.explanation: 公告明确说通过邮件提交的提案不会被审查，等于不会被考虑。其他选项与原文不符或无据。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. Due to ongoing repairs on Madison Drive, the Blue Line shuttle will operate on a modified route starting Monday, March 3. The shuttle will skip the Engineering stop entirely and instead run from the Library directly to Foster Hall. Service frequency will increase to every twelve minutes during peak hours to compensate. Riders heading to Engineering should board the Red Line at Foster Hall and transfer near the South Lot. The standard schedule will resume once paving is complete, which is expected around April 14.

questions.stem: What change will Blue Line riders experience during the modification?

options.A: Service will be suspended entirely on weekends.
options.B: Stops at Foster Hall will be temporarily eliminated.
options.C: The route will skip the Engineering stop entirely.
options.D: Riders must reserve seats through a mobile app.

questions.explanation: 公告明确说蓝线将跳过 Engineering 站。其他选项要么与事实相反，要么是无关行为。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about Engineering-bound riders?

options.A: They will need to make a transfer to reach their destination.
options.B: They will receive a free monthly transit pass during repairs.
options.C: They will travel faster than they did under the standard schedule.
options.D: They will not be able to reach Engineering until April 14.

questions.explanation: 公告说前往 Engineering 的乘客需在 Foster Hall 上红线并在 South Lot 换乘，即需要换乘。其他选项缺乏依据或与原文相反。

items.situation: grand reopening of renovated gallery or performance hall
items.announcement: We're excited to announce that the renovated Brandt Performance Hall will officially reopen on Saturday, March 22. The opening evening features a free chamber concert at 7:00 PM, with seating available on a first-come, first-served basis from 6:15 PM. Tickets are not required, but a valid student or staff ID must be shown at the door. Please be aware that the lobby coat check has been replaced with a self-service locker system. Quarters are no longer accepted; you'll need a tap-enabled student ID or a mobile wallet to operate the lockers.

questions.stem: What is required to enter the reopening concert?

options.A: A ticket purchased through the campus portal
options.B: A small donation to the renovation fund
options.C: A printed program from the music department
options.D: A valid student or staff ID at the door

questions.explanation: 公告明确说门口需出示有效学生或教职工证。其他选项均未被提到为入场要求。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who carry only cash to the concert?

options.A: They will receive a refund at the end of the evening.
options.B: They will not be able to use the new locker system.
options.C: They will be denied entry to the performance hall.
options.D: They will be redirected to the basement coat check.

questions.explanation: 公告说储物柜不接受硬币，需 tap-enabled 学生证或手机钱包，因此只带现金的人无法使用储物柜。其他选项与公告事实矛盾。

items.situation: campus dining hall switching to summer hours
items.announcement: Attention students. Starting Monday, May 19, the Hartwood Dining Hall will switch to its summer schedule. Breakfast will continue from 8:00 to 10:30 AM, but lunch service ends at 1:30 instead of 2:00, and dinner will run from 5:30 to 7:30 only. The grab-and-go bar at the south entrance will remain open until 9:00 PM for late evening snacks. Please bring your campus ID for the grab-and-go scanner. Summer meal-plan refunds for unused balances over fifteen dollars will be processed automatically at the end of the term.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform students of new summer dining hours
options.B: To explain a recent change in meal-plan prices
options.C: To recruit student workers for the dining hall
options.D: To advertise a new grab-and-go menu of items

questions.explanation: 公告核心是告知夏季就餐时间和相关安排。其他选项偏离主题。

questions.stem: Until what time does the grab-and-go bar remain open?

options.A: Until 7:30 PM
options.B: Until 8:00 PM
options.C: Until 9:00 PM
options.D: Until 10:30 PM

questions.explanation: 公告说南门 grab-and-go bar 营业到晚上 9:00。其他时间与公告中其他细节相关或不符。

items.situation: student art market in the quad
items.announcement: Attention students. The Spring Art Market will return to Wexler Quad this Friday from 11:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Over forty student artists will be selling original prints, ceramics, jewelry, and zines, with most items priced between five and twenty-five dollars. Cash and mobile payments are accepted at every booth. Bring a reusable bag if you can; the club is reducing single-use plastic this year. Sign-ups for next semester's market booth slots will also be available at the volunteer table.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To promote a student-run art market on campus
options.B: To advertise paid internships at a campus art club
options.C: To announce a fundraiser for the ceramics program
options.D: To remind students about a printmaking competition

questions.explanation: 公告核心是宣传周五在 Wexler Quad 举办的学生艺术市集。其他选项均不是公告内容。

questions.stem: What does the speaker ask attendees to bring if possible?

options.A: An updated student ID card
options.B: A printout of the artist directory
options.C: A reusable shopping bag
options.D: A signed plastic waste pledge

questions.explanation: 公告明确说带可重复使用的购物袋以减少一次性塑料。其他选项与公告不符。

items.situation: end-of-semester academic showcase with awards
items.announcement: Attention all undergraduates. The Department of Engineering will host its annual End-of-Semester Showcase next Saturday afternoon in Greenfield Auditorium. The event begins at one o'clock with poster presentations from senior capstone teams. Awards for outstanding design, sustainability, and community impact will be announced at four o'clock. All registered participants must arrive by twelve-thirty to set up their displays. Light refreshments will be provided, and family members are warmly welcome. If you have not yet confirmed your attendance, please email the department office before Thursday at five o'clock so that name tags and seating can be prepared in advance.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce details about the upcoming engineering showcase
options.B: To recruit volunteers for the showcase day setup
options.C: To explain the criteria for the sustainability design award
options.D: To remind students about an unrelated department meeting

questions.explanation: 通告主要宣布工程系学期末作品展的详细安排，A 正确。B 不是要点；C 把奖项细节当成主旨；D 与通告无关。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who do not respond by Thursday at five?

options.A: They will be barred from entering the auditorium that Saturday
options.B: They will receive a written reminder from the department office
options.C: They may not have name tags or reserved seats prepared in advance
options.D: They will need to pay an additional registration fee on site

questions.explanation: 通告说请在周四前确认以便准备名牌和座位，因此推断未确认者可能没有这些，C 正确。A 过度推断；B 无依据；D 与通告无关。

items.situation: new fitness equipment installation at recreation center
items.announcement: Good afternoon, members of the campus community. The Recreation Center will install a new set of cardio and strength equipment between June second and June ninth. During this period, the second-floor fitness room will be entirely closed for safety reasons. The first-floor gym, swimming pool, and squash courts will remain open during normal hours. Members holding annual passes may use the partner gym at Hadley Recreation free of charge during the closure by showing their membership card at the front desk. Once the installation is complete, an orientation session for the new machines will be offered on June tenth at five o'clock in the lobby.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To recruit new members for the campus recreation center program
options.B: To inform users about a temporary closure for new equipment installation
options.C: To explain why the annual membership fee has recently increased
options.D: To advertise a partnership with another recreation facility nearby

questions.explanation: 通告主要告知成员设备更新带来的临时关闭，B 正确。A 偏离主旨；C 与通告无关；D 把附带福利当成主旨。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about annual pass holders during the closure period?

options.A: They will receive a partial refund automatically applied to their accounts
options.B: They are encouraged to skip exercise for that week to avoid injuries
options.C: They will have to attend the orientation session before June tenth
options.D: They can continue exercising at no extra cost using Hadley Recreation

questions.explanation: 通告说年卡持有人可免费使用 Hadley，故推断他们可以照常锻炼且不需额外付费，D 正确。A 无依据；B 与通告精神相反；C 把日期弄反。

items.situation: new bike-share station locations
items.announcement: Attention students and staff. Campus Transportation is pleased to announce three additional bike-share stations that will be activated this Friday morning. The new stations are located outside Robertson Hall, behind the Westmoreland Library, and at the south entrance of the Athletic Complex. Each station holds twelve bikes and supports the same mobile application currently used for the existing stations. Riders are reminded to return bikes to any official station within sixty minutes to avoid an overtime fee of three dollars per hour. A printable map of all stations is available on the transportation office website, and questions may be directed to Ms. Bertram at the campus mobility desk.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To remind riders of the rules for returning bikes on time
options.B: To explain why the bike-share fee structure was recently revised
options.C: To announce three new bike-share stations activating this Friday
options.D: To recruit volunteers for maintaining the mobile bike-share application

questions.explanation: 通告主要宣布周五启用的三个新站点，C 正确。A 只是辅助提醒；B 与通告无关；D 与通告无关。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about a rider who keeps a bike for ninety minutes?

options.A: The rider would owe an overtime fee for keeping the bike too long
options.B: The rider would receive a free bonus credit for extended usage
options.C: The rider would be reported to the campus mobility office automatically
options.D: The rider would be required to return the bike to its original station

questions.explanation: 通告说超过 60 分钟会有 3 美元每小时的超时费，所以 90 分钟需要交费，A 正确。B 与通告相反；C 过度推断；D 把要求弄错（任何官方站点都可以）。

items.situation: campus shuttle route change due to construction
items.announcement: Good morning, riders. Beginning Monday, the campus shuttle's evening route will be temporarily modified because of construction on Maple Avenue. The shuttle will no longer stop at the Maple and Fifth crossing, and the South Quad stop will be moved one block east. Service to the medical center and the off-campus apartments will continue without change. Buses will run every twenty minutes between six o'clock in the evening and midnight. Riders are encouraged to check the transit app for live updates, and additional staff will be at the main stop on Monday evening to answer questions about the new route.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain a recent fare increase on the evening shuttle service
options.B: To recruit student riders to help survey other commuters
options.C: To announce that the shuttle will stop running entirely next week
options.D: To inform riders of a temporary route change caused by construction

questions.explanation: 通告主要说明因施工而临时调整路线，D 正确。A 与通告无关；B 与通告无关；C 把临时改道夸大为停运。

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what is changing about the South Quad stop?

options.A: The stop will be eliminated entirely from the evening route
options.B: The stop will be relocated one block east during construction
options.C: The stop will be served only on weekdays for the next month
options.D: The stop will be moved to a different building's lobby entrance

questions.explanation: 通告明确说南广场站点东移一个街区，B 正确。A 把改动夸大为取消；C 与通告无关；D 与通告无关。

items.situation: industry professional speaking about career paths
items.announcement: Hello, students. The Career Development Office is delighted to host Ms. Carla Brennan, senior product manager at a major technology firm, for an evening talk on career paths in the technology sector. The event will take place Wednesday at six-thirty in Holloway Auditorium. Ms. Brennan will discuss how she transitioned from a biology background into product management and will offer practical advice for students considering similar shifts. A brief question-and-answer period will follow the talk, and copies of her recent book will be available for purchase at the entrance. Light snacks will be provided, and seating is on a first-come basis.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce an evening talk by a guest speaker on technology careers
options.B: To promote the sale of Ms. Brennan's recently published book
options.C: To advertise the Career Development Office's spring internship program
options.D: To request student volunteers to help organize the auditorium event

questions.explanation: 通告主要宣布关于职业道路的讲座，A 正确。B 是附带细节；C 与通告无关；D 与通告无关。

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what topic will Ms. Brennan focus on?

options.A: Advanced research methods used in modern biology laboratories
options.B: Investment opportunities in early-stage technology startups
options.C: Her shift from biology into product management work
options.D: Strategies for negotiating starting salaries in technology firms

questions.explanation: 通告说她会谈从生物学背景到产品经理的转型，C 正确。A 把背景错放为主题；B 与通告无关；D 与通告无关。

items.situation: end-of-semester academic showcase with awards
items.announcement: Good afternoon, everyone. As president of the Honors Society, I'm thrilled to invite you to our end-of-semester academic showcase next Thursday at 5 p.m. in Whitman Hall. Students from every department will present their top projects, and we'll close the evening by handing out the Dean's Excellence Awards in three categories. Light refreshments will be provided, but seating is limited to roughly 150 guests. To attend, you must reserve a spot through the Honors Society portal by Tuesday at noon. We hope you'll come celebrate your classmates' achievements with us.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: Invite the campus to a project showcase and awards ceremony
options.B: Recruit new members for the Honors Society this term
options.C: Apologize for changes to the Dean's Excellence Awards
options.D: Discourage attendance because seating is too limited

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A，因为整则通知的核心是邀请大家参加下周四的学期末学术展示和颁奖晚会。B 错在公告完全没有提到招募新成员，是 wrong_purpose。C 错在公告并未对奖项做出任何道歉或变更说明，属于 wrong_purpose。D 错在虽然提到席位有限，但通知的目的是邀请而非劝退，属于 reversed_intent。

questions.stem: What must students do in order to attend the event?

options.A: Submit a project abstract before Tuesday
options.B: Pay a small fee at the door on Thursday
options.C: Reserve a spot on the Honors Society portal
options.D: Sign up through their academic advisor

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C，因为通知明确指出必须在周二中午前通过 Honors Society portal 预约席位。A 错在公告说的是为了出席要预约，而不是提交项目摘要，混淆了出席者与展示者的要求，属于 misattributed_detail。B 错在公告并未提到任何门票费用，属于 wrong_detail。D 错在通过学术导师报名只是合理的校园做法，但本公告并未提及，属于 related_but_not_stated。

items.situation: financial aid office workshop on scholarship applications
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the Financial Aid Office is hosting a scholarship application workshop this coming Wednesday from 3 to 4:30 p.m. in Room 210 of Carver Hall. We'll walk you through the new online portal, explain how to request faculty recommendation letters, and review the personal statement rubric used by reviewers. To get the most out of the session, please bring a rough draft of one essay and a list of three scholarships you're considering. Drop-in advising afterward is first-come, first-served. Students who attend will be given priority review on submissions filed before the March 15th deadline.

questions.stem: What are students asked to bring to the workshop?

options.A: A printed copy of the personal statement rubric
options.B: A draft essay and a list of three scholarships
options.C: Letters of recommendation from two faculty members
options.D: A completed copy of the online application form

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B，因为通知明确要求带一份初稿和三个感兴趣的奖学金清单。A 错在评审标准是由办公室在现场讲解的内容，并不是学生需要带的东西，属于 misattributed_detail。C 错在公告说的是讨论如何请求推荐信，而不是当天带推荐信来，属于 wrong_detail。D 错在没有提到要带完成的申请表，属于 related_but_not_stated。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who attend the workshop?

options.A: They are guaranteed to receive at least one scholarship
options.B: They must submit their applications during the session
options.C: They are required to apply for three separate awards
options.D: They may have their applications reviewed sooner than others

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D，因为公告说参加者在 3 月 15 日前提交可获得优先审阅，可以合理推断他们的申请会比其他人更早被审。A 错在保证获奖远远超出公告内容范围，属于 over_inference。B 错在公告并未要求当场提交，属于 wrong_detail。C 错在公告只是建议带三个奖学金清单，并不强制申请三项，属于 wrong_detail。

items.situation: campus bookstore moving to a new building
items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. The campus bookstore will be moving from its current location in Henderson Hall to the renovated ground floor of the Student Union starting Monday, October 14th. The new space is larger and will include a dedicated study lounge and a small coffee bar. During the move, the bookstore will be closed from Thursday afternoon through Sunday evening. You can still order textbooks online during that period, and we'll hold any pickups until the new store reopens. Please stop by the Student Union next Monday morning to check out the new space.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: Encourage students to order more textbooks online
options.B: Apologize for delays in textbook deliveries this term
options.C: Inform the campus that the bookstore is relocating
options.D: Announce a permanent closure of Henderson Hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C，因为通知的核心信息是书店从 Henderson Hall 搬到学生中心。A 错在线上订购只是搬迁期间的临时安排，并非通知的主要目的，属于 too_narrow。B 错在公告完全没有对延迟交付道歉，属于 wrong_purpose。D 错在公告只说书店搬走，并没有说整个 Henderson Hall 永久关闭，属于 over_inference。

questions.stem: What will the new bookstore location include?

options.A: A study lounge and a coffee bar
options.B: A printing center for course materials
options.C: An expanded faculty office area
options.D: A 24-hour textbook pickup locker

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A，因为公告明确说新店面包含一个专门的自习休息区和一个小咖啡吧。B 错在公告并未提到打印中心，属于 related_but_not_stated。C 错在公告只字未提教师办公区域，属于 related_but_not_stated。D 错在公告说搬迁期间会保留取书订单，并未提到 24 小时自助取书柜，属于 wrong_detail。

items.situation: interdisciplinary conference call for papers
items.announcement: I'm pleased to announce that our department is hosting an interdisciplinary conference on technology and society this April, and we're now accepting paper proposals. We welcome submissions from undergraduates, graduate students, and faculty across all departments, including the arts and humanities. Proposals should be no longer than 400 words and must be uploaded to the conference website by February 20th. Selected presenters will be notified by early March and will receive a small travel stipend if traveling from another campus. If you've been working on a project that connects two or more fields, this is a great chance to share it with a wider audience.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: Recap last year's interdisciplinary conference findings
options.B: Recruit volunteers to staff the April conference
options.C: Warn students that proposal rules have changed
options.D: Invite proposals for an upcoming interdisciplinary conference

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 D，因为整则公告的目的是邀请大家在 2 月 20 日前为四月的跨学科会议提交论文提案。A 错在公告完全没有回顾以往会议，属于 wrong_purpose。B 错在公告并未招募志愿者，属于 wrong_purpose。C 错在公告并未提到规则有任何变化，属于 wrong_purpose。

questions.stem: What is true about the paper proposals?

options.A: They must be co-authored with a faculty mentor
options.B: They must not exceed 400 words in length
options.C: They must be submitted in person at the department
options.D: They are only open to graduate students this year

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 B，因为公告明确指出 proposals 不应超过 400 字。A 错在公告并未要求必须有教师合作者，属于 related_but_not_stated。C 错在公告说要上传到会议网站，并非线下递交，属于 wrong_detail（与事实相反）。D 错在公告说欢迎本科生、研究生和教师，并非只对研究生开放，属于 wrong_detail（与事实相反）。

items.situation: temporary road closure and detour instructions
items.announcement: Due to scheduled utility work, Maple Avenue between the library and the science quad will be closed to vehicles from 6 a.m. Tuesday until 8 p.m. Thursday. Drivers should use Elm Street as a marked detour, which adds about five minutes to most campus routes. Pedestrians and cyclists may still pass through using the sidewalk on the north side, though we ask that you slow down near the work zone. Shuttle service will continue, but the East Loop bus will skip the library stop and pick up at the Student Union instead. Please plan a few extra minutes into your commute.

questions.stem: What change will affect the East Loop shuttle service?

options.A: It will skip the library stop and use the Student Union instead
options.B: It will be canceled entirely for the rest of the week
options.C: It will start running every five minutes during the closure
options.D: It will reroute to Elm Street and add two extra stops

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 A，因为公告说东环巴士会跳过图书馆站，改在学生中心上下客。B 错在公告说班车继续运行，并未取消，属于 wrong_detail（与事实相反）。C 错在公告并未提及任何加密班次的信息，属于 related_but_not_stated。D 错在 Elm Street 是车辆的绕行路线，并非班车的新路线，属于 misattributed_detail。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about pedestrians during the closure?

options.A: They are required to use the Elm Street detour as well
options.B: They will be charged a small fee to cross the work area
options.C: They can still walk through but should move carefully
options.D: They must show their student ID at a checkpoint

questions.explanation: 正确答案是 C，因为公告说行人和骑行者仍可通过北侧人行道，但要在施工区附近放慢速度，可推断他们仍可通行但需小心。A 错在 Elm Street 是车辆的绕行路线，并非行人必须走的，属于 misattributed_detail。B 错在公告完全没有提及任何费用，属于 unrelated_inference。D 错在公告没有提到任何身份验证或检查点，属于 over_inference。
